title: Hiring: Video Editors (Long-Form & Short-Form | Remote)
description:
We are a small but growing team looking for reliable video editors who want to grow with us long-term.



This role is best suited for individuals who not only know how to edit but also understand content, including what makes a video engaging, what makes a “hook” work, and how to structure videos that keep attention.





Availability



You can work flexible hours as long as you submit videos on time, but we may require you to be responsive Monday to Saturday from 9:30 AM to 5:30 PM Philippine time for feedback and communication.





References



Long-form: 



- 

- 



Short-form: 



- 

- 

- 

- 





About the Work



You will be working on both long-form and short-form content, including podcasts and social media clips.



Your responsibilities will include:



- Cutting and structuring long-form content into clean, watchable videos

- Selecting strong short-form clips (not random cuts)

- Ensuring the first 30 seconds (hook) are clear, engaging, and make sense

- Adding clean, accurate captions with proper grammar and phrasing





Requirements



- Strong English comprehension (*MOST IMPORTANT*)

    - Must understand context, conversations, and messaging

    - Must recognize what makes a hook or clip effective



- Strong attention to detail

    - Catch grammar mistakes, caption errors, and awkward phrasing

    - Ensure quality, especially in the first 30 seconds



- Good clip selection skills

    - Ability to identify meaningful and engaging 
nts

    - Not just cutting randomly



- Clean captioning skills

    - Proper grammar and capitalization

    - Natural, easy-to-read phrasing



- Basic editing skills

    - Clean cuts

    - Simple subtitles

    - Clear structure



- Reliable, responsive, and easy to communicate with (WhatsApp/Slack during work hours)



- Able to follow systems, apply feedback, and improve quickly





Tools



You may use tools such as Premiere Pro, Final Cut, Da Vinci, CapCut or similar.



Specific tools are less important than output quality.





Compensation



Compensation will be discussed once candidates are shortlisted or qualified for the role.





How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following:



1. Your WhatsApp number

2. Confirmation that you are available during the listed time window

3. What type of video editing software you use

4. Your portfolio (short-form + long-form samples, if available)

title: Part-Time Creative Designer – Social Media, Email & Branding (Remote)
description:
Schedule: Monday–Friday, Available anytime from 12:00 PM – 9:00 PM (PHT) (Ideally working 4h per day, but that depends on workload)

Work Arrangement: Remote



About Boardgame Studio

Boardgame Studio [
] is a brand creative and incubation studio that partners with founders, creators, and companies to build, launch, and grow standout brands. Our services span brand identity, package design, creative direction, web design and development, brand strategy, and copywriting. We're also the team behind in-house brands like Jiggies, Notorious Foodie, and FluffCo — built from the ground up right here in our studio.



About the Role

We are looking for a talented and detail-oriented Part-Time Graphic Designer to join our team. In this role, you will create visually compelling designs across a range of formats — from social media graphics and
 layouts to product packaging and photo manipulation. 



You'll work directly with a Project Manager who will guide you through tasks, provide briefs, and ensure alignment on priorities. Daily check-ins are part of the workflow to keep projects on track, share updates, and make sure you have everything you need to do your best work. This is a fast-paced environment where quick turnarounds and clear communication are key.



Responsibilities

- Design and produce social media graphics,
 layouts, and other marketing materials

- Perform photo manipulation and retouching to meet project specifications

- Collaborate with tea
mbers using Figma for design development, feedback, and handoff

- Maintain brand consistency across all visual outputs

- Manage multiple projects simultaneously, often delivering final assets within a one-day turnaround (longer turn-around times are allotted for larger projects)

- Organize and maintain design files with proper naming conventions for easy team access and version control

- Communicate proactively with the team — asking clarifying questions to ensure accuracy and alignment before executing



What We're Looking For/Requirements



Required Skills & Experience

- Proven experience in graphic design, with a strong portfolio showcasing work in photo manipulation,
 layouts, and social media graphics

- Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop (must have access to authentic/licensed Adobe products)

- Extensive hands-on experience working in Figma

- A keen eye for design — strong sense of layout, typography, color theory, and visual hierarchy

- Open to working with AI-powered tools (e.g., Higgsfield.ai, Claude) as part of the creative workflow — you don't need to be an expert, but a willingness to learn and adapt is essential

- Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment and consistently meet tight deadlines (one-day turnaround)



Nice to Have

- Packaging design experience

- Video editing skills (e.g., Adobe Premiere Pro, After Effects, or similar tools)



Soft Skills

- Excellent communication skills — clear, responsive, and not afraid to ask questions

- Strong time management and ability to prioritize competing tasks

- Self-motivated and dependable, with a proactive approach to problem-solving



Technical Requirements

Since this is a remote position, candidates must have the following:

- A computer with a strong processor and dedicated GPU capable of handling graphic design workloads

- Reliable, stable internet connection

- Licensed copies of Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop



How to Apply

Please submit your resume, portfolio, and a brief note about your relevant experience. We'd love to see examples of work in social media design,
 layouts, and photo manipulation.

title: Amazon Listing & Category Management Specialist
description:
Role Brief:

We are looking for a dedicated, high-level Amazon Listing & Category Management Specialist to take full ownership of a specific product category within our storefront. This is not a "task-taker" role; we need someone who understands the nuances of Seller Central and can manage a category from top to bottom independently.



Key Responsibilities:



Listing Excellence: End-to-end listing creation, optimization (copy and backend), and managing complex variations.



SEO & Growth: Conduct deep-dive keyword research and competitor analysis to improve organic visibility and conversion rates.



Operations: Manage catalog health, troubleshoot listing suppressions, and coordinate FBA shipments and inventory levels.



Market Intelligence: Monitor the competitive landscape and proactively suggest improvements to keep our category leading the market.



Required Experience & Skills:



Strict Requirement: At least 2 years of continuous, uninterrupted experience specifically in Amazon Seller Central management.



Expertise in Amazon SEO, Helium 10/Jungle Scout, and Flat Files.



Strong understanding of FBA workflows and inventory planning.



Proactive problem-solver—you don't wait for a task; you find what needs fixing.



Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills.



?? HOW TO APPLY (Read Carefully) ??

To ensure you have high attention to detail and have read this entire post, please follow these instructions exactly. Failure to do so will result in your application being automatically ignored.



Change the Subject Line of your application to: "Amazon Category Pro - [Your Favorite Fruit] - 2 Years Straight" (e.g., Amazon Category Pro - Mango - 2 Years Straight).



In the first line of your cover letter, state the exact dates of your 2-year continuous Amazon experience (e.g., January 2022 – January 2024).



Briefly describe the most complex variation or catalog issue you have successfully resolved in Seller Central.

title: Appointment Setter / Lead Generation Specialist (Web, AI & Automation Services)
description:
We are looking for a results-driven appointment setter to help us consistently book qualified meetings with business owners interested in web design, AI, and automation services.



This is a performance-focused role. If you can generate conversations and get decision-makers on calls, you will do very well here.



You will be responsible for identifying potential leads, initiating outreach, and setting appointments directly on our calendar.



?



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Identify and source potential leads (business owners, founders, decision-makers)

 • Conduct outreach via
, social media (Instagram, LinkedIn), and other channels

 • Start conversations and qualify prospects

 • Book meetings directly into our calendar

 • Maintain basic tracking of outreach and conversations



?



What We’re Looking For

 • Strong communication skills (clear, confident, persuasive)

 • Ability to start conversations and get responses

 • Self-starter — no micromanagement

 • Comfortable with cold outreach (this is NOT a passive role)

 • Experience in lead generation, appointment setting, or sales is a plus





Ideal Candidate

 • Hungry, competitive, and outcome-driven

 • Understands that volume + consistency = results

 • Not afraid of rejection

 • Focused on getting meetings booked — not just sending messages



?



Important



This role is about results, not activity.

If you can consistently book meetings, you will have long-term opportunities with us.



?



How to Apply



Send a brief message explaining:

 1. Your experience with outreach or appointment setting

 2. What platforms/tools you’ve used

 3. How you would approach booking meetings for web/AI services

        4. Results from your experience and past work

description:
Are you a social media enthusiast with a knack for building online communities?



TREND Agency is a fast-growing creative studio based in Melbourne, Australia. We create bold, scroll-stopping content for brands across food, lifestyle and beyond. We’re currently on the lookout for a Philippines-based Social Media & Community Manager to join us in a part-time or casual capacity.



What You’ll Be Doing

Creating and scheduling content for various clients

Producing a monthly content calendars for internal review

Daily community management: responding to DMs, comments, and engaging with followers

Maintaining consistency across brands tone and messaging

Working closely with our internal social media team



You’ll Need

Experience using Meta Business Suite (Instagram &
)

Excellent written English and communication skills

A proactive attitude and strong attention to detail

Interested?

title: Social Media Editor
description:
We’re looking for a Social Media Editor who gets the internet. You’ll be creating and editing short-form videos and visuals designed to go viral — not just exist. If you’re chronically online, obsessed with trends, and know why content blows up, this role was made for you.



Why You’ll Love This Role:

*Fully remote — work from anywhere

*No micromanaging

*Paid training + ongoing feedback

*Creative, supportive, non-toxic team

*Real growth opportunities into senior creative or strategy roles

*You get paid to do what you already do for fun



What You’ll Be Doing:

You’ll be editing and creating content that’s meant to perform, not just look pretty.



*Editing viral-style short-form videos (Reels, TikToks, Shorts)

*Creating eye-catching visual content and photos for social media

*Turning ideas, trends, and raw footage into scroll-stopping posts

*Keeping up with trending audios, formats, 
s, and Gen Z humor

*Writing captions that sound real, not robotic

*Collaborating with a creative team that actually listens to your ideas

*Helping social media pages grow through smart, trend-driven content

*You’ll get training, clear direction, and the freedom to bring your own creative flavor.



What We’re Looking For:

We’re not hunting for “years of experience.” We’re looking for taste, instinct, and passion. That looks like:



*A genuine love for social media and content creation

*Strong understanding of trends, viral formats, and internet culture

*High-level English communication skills

*A good eye for visuals, pacing, and aesthetics

*Confidence, curiosity, and positive energy

*Willingness to learn, test ideas, and improve fast

* Having a personal brand or active social media account is a plus, not a requirement.



How to Apply?



Send us:

*A short video introduction (1–2 minutes) showing your personality, creativity, and why you’re a great fit. NO INTRO VIDEO AUTO FAIL

*Link to your creative portfolio

* Add the word 'Awesome' to your application so we know you've read everything

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
This Role Is For You If You’re:



- Chronically online (and proud of it)

- Always scrolling, saving, reposting, analyzing

- The friend who just knows why a post went viral

- Fluent in English and confident expressing ideas

- Creative, enthusiastic, and full of good energy

- Lowkey building (or dreaming of building) your own online brand



If social media feels less like “work” and more like second nature, then this is for you! 



What You’ll Be Doing:



You’ll help create, shape, and manage content that’s meant to perform, not just exist.



Your day-to-day includes:

- Creating short-form videos and trendy visual content

- Brainstorming ideas based on what’s viral, aesthetic, and engaging

- Writing captions that sound human (not corporate)

- Staying on top of trends, audios, formats, and Gen Z humor

- Helping grow social media pages through smart, creative content

- Collaborating with a creative team that actually values your ideas



You’ll be trained, supported, and encouraged to bring your own creative voice.





What We’re Looking For:



We’re not obsessed with years of experience. We care more about:



- Genuine love for social media + content creation

- Strong understanding of Gen Z trends and internet culture

- High-level English communication skills

- A good eye for aesthetics and visuals

- Confidence, enthusiasm, and positive energy

- Willingness to learn, experiment, and grow

- Having a personal brand or active social media presence is a bonus, not a requirement.





Why You’ll Love This Role:



- 100% remote (work from anywhere)

- No micromanaging

- Paid training + continuous feedback

- A creative, supportive, non-toxic team

- Opportunities to grow into higher-level creative or strategy roles

- You get paid to do what you already love





How to Apply:



- Send us a short video introduction (1–2 minutes) showing your personality, creativity, and why you’d be a great fit

- Links to your creative portfolio ot any content you’ve created (personal or professional)

- Link to your resume/CV



IMPORTANT:

1. No video intro = not considered

2. Boring or low-effort intro = also a pass

3. Type '67' in your subject line so we know you've read this far



This role is for someone who shows up with personality, creativity, and confidence.



If you read this and thought “wait… this is literally me” — apply now.

We can’t wait to see what you bring!

title: SEO Outreach & Backlink Specialist (with Content Structuring Skills)
description:

Key Responsibilities

Build high-quality backlinks through ethical (white-hat) strategies

Identify and execute outreach opportunities (guest posts, partnerships, niche edits, PR links, etc.)

Research and secure links from relevant, high-authority domains

Develop and manage
 outreach campaigns

Structure and optimize website content for SEO performance

Improve internal linking and on-page SEO structure

Analyze backlink profiles and suggest improvements

Work on strategies to improve Domain Authority (DA) / Domain Rating (DR)

Monitor competitor backlink strategies and replicate winning tactics

Requirements

Proven experience in SEO link building & outreach

Strong understanding of tools like:

Ahrefs / SEMrush / Moz

Google Search Console

Screaming Frog (bonus)

Experience with anchor text strategy & link diversification

Ability to identify toxic vs high-quality backlinks

Good understanding of content structuring for SEO (H1-H6, schema, internal linking)

Strong communication skills for outreach campaigns

Experience in UK or international SEO is a plus

Nice to Have

Experience with Digital PR campaigns

Knowledge of schema markup (FAQ, Article, Organization, etc.)

Understanding of AI SEO / GEO SEO strategies

Experience working with WordPress

What We’re Looking For

Someone who focuses on quality over quantity

Can bring new ideas to improve domain authority

Data-driven mindset with clear reporting

Long-term collaboration mindset

How to Apply



Please share:



Examples of backlinks you’ve built

Outreach campaigns you’ve managed

Tools and strategies you typically use

Any case studies showing improvement in DA/traffic

title: Senior Business Development Manager / Sales Closer
description:
About Us:



Talking HealthTech connects the digital health ecosystem through media, content, community, and partnerships.



THT Productions is our media production arm, helping healthcare and health tech organisations create high-quality podcasts, video content, branded content, and campaign assets.



We work with companies in healthcare and health technology that want to build visibility, credibility, and stronger market presence.



We are looking for a senior, client-facing sales professional to help us grow both sides of the business.



About the Role:



This is not an admin role.

This is not a support role.

This is not a junior appointment setter role.



This is a senior sales and business development role for someone who is confident speaking with decision-makers, comfortable running sales conversations, and able to represent the company professionally in writing, on calls, and in meetings.



You will help drive revenue across:



* Talking HealthTech partnerships and sponsorships

* THT Productions podcast, video, and branded content projects

* expansion opportunities with existing clients and partners



Some opportunities will be warm. Some will need follow-up. Some will need you to create 
ntum through research, outreach, LinkedIn, and consistent follow-up.



We want someone who is commercially mature, highly autonomous, and comfortable owning a pipeline.



What You’ll Be Doing:

* Follow up inbound leads, referrals, event contacts, and existing opportunities

* Prospect and generate new opportunities when needed through LinkedIn, research, outreach, and follow-up

* Run sales calls and video meetings with senior stakeholders

* Write clear, professional
s and messages that move deals forward

* Present our offers confidently and handle objections well

* Close partnership, sponsorship, and production opportunities

* Keep CRM records, notes, and next steps up to date in Pipedrive

* Work closely with the Founder to refine messaging, offers, and sales approach

* Represent the company professionally in all client-facing communication



What We’re Looking For:



You should have strong experience in one or more of the following:



* B2B sales

* business development

* agency sales

* media sales

* sponsorship sales

* SaaS or consultative services sales



You must also have:



* excellent spoken English

* excellent written English

* confidence on the phone and on video calls

* available to work during Australian business hours (9am - 5pm AEDT - Sydney)

* experience speaking with managers, directors, founders, or executives

* the ability to work independently without constant supervision

* strong follow-up habits

* confidence using LinkedIn as part of your sales workflow

* experience managing a pipeline inside a CRM (Pipedrive)



This Role Is a Strong Fit If You:

* are a strong communicator, verbally and in writing

* are comfortable getting on calls and leading conversations

* know how to move a deal forward without sounding pushy or sloppy

* can build trust with senior people quickly

* are proactive and commercially minded

* can manage your own time and priorities

* want a long-term role where you can grow with the business

* are interested in healthcare, health tech, media, or B2B partnerships



This Role Is Not for You If:

* you are only comfortable doing chat or
 support

* you avoid phone calls or live meetings

* you need step-by-step supervision all day

* you are looking for a casual side job

* you are not confident communicating with senior stakeholders



Why Join Us:



This is a chance to work closely with an established founder-led business in a niche that actually matters.



You’ll be selling across a respected health tech media brand and a growing production business, with room to build relationships, deepen your market knowledge, and become a meaningful part of our growth.



We are looking for someone who wants this to be their main professional focus, not a filler job between other gigs.



Working Arrangement:

* Full-time remote

* Long-term role

* Monthly salary



Flexible remote setup, but you must have reliable internet, good audio, and a professional environment for video calls and meetings



To Apply:



Please do not send a generic copy-paste application.



To be considered, send:

* A short introduction about your B2B sales experience

* A brief voice note or Loom video in English

* One example of a deal you helped close and what you personally did to move it forward

* The CRM tools you’ve used

* Your expected hourly rate

* Start your application with the words: HealthTech Growth (That helps us know you read the full post... we can also tell if you've just generated it through Chat GPT too... )

s, and customer inquiries

title: Real Estate Portfolio Finance Manager
description:
*KINDLY READ THE JOB DESCRIPTION & THE APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY.*



Who We Are:



Tracing our history back to 1920, EJF Real Estate Services has been a family-owned and family-operated business for over 30 years, specializing in community association management and real estate sales across the Washington, DC metropolitan area. Today, we are the largest DC-based property management firm, proudly serving hundreds of clients throughout the DMV. Our extensive market knowledge, hands-on industry experience, and best-in-class customer service help communities thrive. 



What You'll Do:



As a Finance Manager, you’ll oversee the financial reporting and analysis for a portfolio of community associations. This is a client-facing, oversight role — not transactional bookkeeping. You’ll ensure accurate monthly financials, guide Boards of Directors in understanding their financial position, and partner with internal teams to resolve issues. This position is ideal for an experienced accounting professional who thrives in a dynamic, client-service environment.



Requirements:



Ensure monthly financial reports accurately reflect the association’s financial position.

Review general ledgers, statements of revenue/expenses, and balance sheets to resolve issues and correct errors.

Serve as the primary financial resource for both internal tea
mbers and external clients (board members and association representatives).

Oversee and ensure completion of administrative tasks, including tax payments, end-of-year tax returns, and government filings.

Support external audits for associations within the portfolio.

Review and monitor banking and investment activity.

Analyze and review loans, special assessments, and other financial obligations as required.

Provide long-term financial planning guidance for capital projects.

Attend weekly tea
etings, set goals, and complete assigned tasks on time.

Perform additional duties as assigned.



Qualifications:



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field (or equivalent experience).

3+ years of accounting, financial experience in property management (HOA, condo, coop) is required.

Experience working with Vantaca property management software is required.

Strong knowledge of GAAP and financial reporting.

Excellent analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills.

Strong interpersonal and communication skills with the ability to present financial information clearly to non-financial stakeholders.

Must be able to analyze data issues and execute on solutions.

Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.



Working Hours: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST; Monday – Friday (US time zones)



Benefits: HMO and PTO after 90 days.



How to apply:

1. Please check out the company website before submitting an application: 
.

2. Send an
 ATTACHMENT with your updated resume in PDF format.

3. Please send a link to your video recording introducing yourself & your relevant experience based on the job description, and include your OnlineJobs.PH profile link.



Kindly send your application to 
 the subject line, kindly indicate the position Real Estate Portfolio Finance Manager - your name.



*Applicants who will apply through onlinejobs.ph will not be considered.

*Shortlisted applicants will be contacted by
 for interview scheduling.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Transaction Coordinator - Loan Mortgage Underwriter
description:
Funding is a U.S.-based private money lending company that provides short-term, asset-based loans to real estate investors. We focus on first- and second-position loans, bridge funding, gap funding, and creative real estate transactions.



We value clean execution, capital protection, and professional communication.



Role Overview



We are hiring a Loan Processor/ Jr. Underwriter to support real estate deals from intake through funding. This role is the operational backbone of our lending business and works directly with borrowers, brokers, and internal leadership.



This is not a bank mortgage role. You will support private money deals using CRM pipelines and internal workflows.



Key Responsibilities



Manage real estate deals inside the CRM.

Collect, organize, and review borrower and property documents.

Assist with preliminary deal review (LTV, ARV, exit strategy – no approvals)

Prepare deals for internal review and decision-making

Communicate with borrowers and brokers via
, phone, and chat

Request missing documents and follow up to keep deals moving

Coordinate with title companies and insurance providers for closings



Track conditions, timelines, and closing tasks

Maintain clean CRM records, notes, and document uploads

Assist with light lead follow-up and deal intake

Important Authority Boundaries







Requirements

2+ years experience in real estate transactions, loan processing, or lending support

Strong attention to detail and organization

Excellent written and spoken English

Comfortable communicating with U.S.-based clients

Ability to manage multiple deals at once

Experience using CRMs and pipeline-based systems



Nice to Have (Not Required):

Private money or hard money lending experience

Familiarity with real estate investing terminology

GoHighLevel or similar CRM experience



What Success Looks Like

Clean, accurate CRM records

Deals move smoothly with minimal rework

Borrowers feel informed and supported

Leadership does not need to fix or chase files



How to Apply

Please apply with:

Please submit your resume along with a brief introduction explaining your relevant experience and why you’re an excellent fit for this role. Include the word “Lending" in your application message so we know you read this fully.

title: Service Coordinator - Maintenance Specialist
description:
Department:

SJA Pros



Reports To:

Operations Coordinator 



Role Type:

Full-Time, Remote



The Service Coordinator is responsible for driving the daily movement of work orders within assigned trades (such as plumbing, HVAC, remediation, or carpentry). This role ensures rapid assignment, efficient scheduling, and consistent progress across all active jobs.



Acting as the central point of coordination between SJA Pros, subcontractors, and the Maintenance Services Team, the Service Coordinator maintains clear communication, accountability, and 
ntum at every stage of the work order lifecycle.



This is a high-volume, fast-paced role where responsiveness and consistency in moving work forward are critical to success. In addition to maintaining workflow, this role supports multi-step coordination by tracking progress, identifying next steps, and helping ensure work is completed efficiently from assignment through completion.



This role is also responsible for building and managing strong working relationships with assigned subcontractors, ensuring alignment with expectations, consistent communication, and reliable performance.



Specific knowledge of a trade or trade-related work—such as plumbing, water remediation, carpentry, or HVAC—is preferred but not required. A strong desire to learn and understand the inner workings of these trades is essential for success in this role.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES 



Work Order Flow & Execution

 Manage the daily movement of all assigned work orders within your trades 

 Review and take action on new work orders immediately 

 Ensure timely assignment and scheduling of all jobs 

 Actively monitor progress and prevent delays or stalled work 

 Maintain a high level of daily engagement across all active jobs 



Subcontractor Coordination & Relationship Management

 Serve as the primary point of contact for assigned subcontractors 

 Coordinate scheduling between subcontractors and tenants 

 Build and maintain strong working relationships with subcontractors 

 Reinforce expectations around timelines, communication, and documentation 

 Follow up on delays, missed updates, or incomplete work 



Project Support & Multi-Step Coordination

 Track and support jobs that require multiple steps or trades 

 Coordinate next steps to ensure work progresses in the correct sequence 

 Identify when additional work, approvals, or escalation is needed 

 Support overall job progression from assignment through completion 

 Escalate complex or high-risk issues when appropriate 



Communication & Documentation

 Maintain clear, consistent communication with tenants and internal teams 

 Provide timely updates on job status, delays, and next steps 

 Ensure all activity, communication, and updates are documented in ClickUp 

 Keep all parties aligned and informed throughout the lifecycle of the job 



Quality & Completion Oversight

 Confirm work is completed and properly documented before closure 

 Ensure required photos, notes, and details are submitted 

 Identify and flag any issues related to quality or incomplete work 

 Support accurate and clean job completion for invoicing readiness 





REQUIRED SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS



 Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple priorities at once 

 High sense of urgency and consistent follow-through 

 Clear and professional communication skills 

 Ability to work in a fast-paced, high-volume environment 

 Strong problem-solving skills and ability to keep work moving forward 

 Calm under pressure, with a natural drive to keep things moving smoothly

 Experience in maintenance coordination, dispatching, or project coordination required



What Success Looks Like

 Maintain a 24-hour active job touch rate of 95%+ across all assigned work orders 

 Ensure new work orders are assigned or scheduled within the same business day

 Maintain zero stalled jobs without documented follow-up or next action 

 Ensure subcontractor scheduling occurs within 24 hours of assignment

 Build and maintain strong subcontractor relationships that support responsiveness and performance

 Keep all communication and updates fully documented in ClickUp





HOW TO APPLY 



Please send a copy of your resume along with the the following:

1. Self-Introduction Video: Please record a short video (1-2 minutes) introducing yourself, highlighting your relevant experience, and answering the following question: What unique strengths do you feel you would bring to this role?



2. Typing Test Result: Please complete a typing test and share the results with us. You can use any online typing test platform of your choice.



3. Internet Speed Test Result: Please perform an internet speed test and provide the results. You can use websites like speedtest.net for this purpose.



We look forward to getting to know you better and discussing how you can contribute to our team.

title: Video and Content Editor
description:
About Funktion Active



Funktion Active is a premium female activewear and athleisure brand where function meets fashion. We create pieces for women who want performance, style, confidence, and versatility in one. Our customer wants apparel that works hard, looks sharp, and feels good in real life — from training sessions to coffee runs to everything in between.



Our brand is built on a few non-negotiables:



Fun — We embrace the grind, support each other, celebrate wins, and bring good energy to the work

Fast & Focused — We move quickly, prioritise what matters, and keep things clean and effective

Funky — We bring creativity, individuality, and personality — always with purpose

Follow-through — We do what we say, communicate clearly, and take ownership

First Class — We care about standards, details, and delivering polished, commercially strong work



Everything we put into the world needs to reflect that — especially our content.



Role Overview



We are looking for a Video and Content Editor who can take large volumes of raw footage and turn it into polished, high-performing, on-brand content for social media, paid ads, and campaigns.



This is not a basic editing role.



We need someone who can shape content that feels sharp, current, clean, and commercially effective — with a strong focus on scroll-stopping, high-performing short-form content.



This role also plays a key part in building and maintaining a strong content reserve, ensuring the brand stays ahead rather than constantly reacting.



Scroll-Stopping & Viral Content Standard



Content should not only look good — it must perform.



We are creating content for fast-moving social environments where attention is earned, not given. Every piece should be designed to stop the scroll within the first few seconds and hold attention through to the end.



This means:



Strong hooks within the first 1–3 seconds

Clean, engaging visual movement

Edits that feel native to the platform

Content that feels current and relevant



We are not chasing trends blindly, but we are also not ignoring them. The expectation is to understand what is working and apply it in a way that still feels on-brand and elevated.



The goal is to consistently produce content that is:



Highly watchable

Easy to consume

Engaging enough to be saved, shared, or replayed

Capable of performing both organically and in paid ads



Good content is not enough. It needs to compete.



Key Responsibilities

Edit raw footage into polished short-form and campaign-ready content

Identify the strongest clips, moments, and creative opportunities from large footage sets

Create clean, engaging edits with strong pacing and flow

Apply colour correction and ensure accurate product colour representation

Format content correctly for Instagram, paid ads, website, and other platforms

Add captions, text overlays, and simple motion elements where needed

Prepare final exports in a clean, organised format for the team

Maintain strong file organisation and naming conventions

Support building and managing a structured, searchable content library

Flag strong unused footage and suggest new content opportunities

Work through large footage banks consistently to build a content reserve

Deliver work that is close to final with minimal revisions required

Identify and prioritise content with strong potential to perform as scroll-stopping social content

Content Focus

Instagram Reels (primary focus)

Gym, fitness, and training content

Paid ad creatives (Meta)

TikTok-style edits

Website and campaign videos

UGC-style and behind-the-scenes content

Product and founder-led content

Expected Output

Up to 150 unique edited pieces per month

Most edits are short-form (~15 seconds)

Work through a 20+ hour footage bank consistently

Maintain a content reserve at least 4 weeks ahead

Creative & Brand Standards



Content should feel:



Fun, engaging, and on-brand

Clean, polished, and premium

Current but not cheap or overdone

Authentic while still elevated



Avoid:



Cheap-looking edits

Overused templates

Cheesy transitions or effects

Sloppy pacing

Visual inconsistency



Reference brands: CSB, Lilo, Hona Active



Workflow & Communication

Work within Google Drive systems for files, briefs, and feedback

Follow provided direction for copy, music, and creative intent

Work independently while staying aligned with priorities and timelines



Communication expectations:



Daily check-in

End-of-day update

Weekly meeting



Daily updates should include:



Completed work

Work in progress

Items awaiting review

Blockers

Next priorities



We value clear, proactive communication — no guessing, no disappearing.



Revisions & Quality Expectations

Most content should require 1–2 revisions max

First drafts should already be close to final

Work should be clean, accurate, and ready to use

What Success Looks Like

Content delivered quickly with minimal hand holding

Consistent editing quality across all outputs

Strong attention to detail and product accuracy

Initiative and problem-solving without constant direction

Content bank stays ahead (minimum 4 weeks)

Files and assets are organised and easy to use

Communication is reliable and proactive

Ideal Candidate

Mid-level to senior editor

Strong experience with short-form and social-first content

Strong eye for pacing, visuals, and content flow

Organised and comfortable managing large volumes of footage

Strong written English and communication

Experience in fitness, activewear, or ecommerce is a plus

Experience with both organic and paid content is a plus

Fast, reliable, detail-oriented, and accountable

Not a Fit If You

Are slow, disorganised, or inconsistent

Need constant direction for simple decisions

Struggle with volume or deadlines

Produce generic, low-quality, or template-heavy work

Miss details or create workflow chaos

Role Structure

Full-time or contract (depending on candidate)

~40 hours per week

Long-term opportunity with growth potential

Confidentiality



You will have access to unreleased campaigns and internal content. Professionalism and discretion are required.



Final Note



We are looking for someone who gives a damn.



Someone fast, sharp, organised, and proud of the work they put out.

Someone who can take raw footage and turn it into content that actually looks like a brand.



Someone who understands:



Fun doesn’t mean messy

Premium doesn’t mean boring

Speed doesn’t mean sloppy



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: SOCIAL MEDIA + CONTENT COORDINATOR for (Funktion Active Activewear/Fashion)

Plan + create content for Instagram, TikTok, and

Apply via DM/email: 

 Subject line: Funktion Social Gem





“Show us proof accounts, metrics, before/after examples.”



We are waiting for you to be ONE OF US!

BE FUNKY!

title: Framer Designer Needed
description:
Framer Designer Needed — Replicate Websites Pixel-Perfect (Ongoing Work)



Overview



We run a website design service and need a skilled Framer designer to join us on an ongoing basis.



Your job is simple: we send you a reference website URL via Vercel and a brief, you recreate it in Framer as close to pixel-perfect as possible. We handle everything else — the client, the tech, the deployment. All you need to do is open the URL, study it, and rebuild it beautifully in Framer.



This is not a creative role. You are not designing from scratch. You are replicating — and replicating well.



---



What Every Brief Looks Like



Every task we give you will follow the same format:



```

Reference URL: [the live website to replicate via Vercel]

Client: [client name]

Business: [what they do]

Branding: [colors / fonts / logo if available]

Copy: [specific text to use, or "match reference"]

```



You open the URL. You study it. You rebuild it in Framer. You send us the staging link and screenshots. That's the job.  There is no new work for you to do, this is a copy and paste job but you must have experience in framer to apply.



---



What We Expect From You



**Pixel-perfect replication**

Colors, fonts, spacing, layout, border radius, shadows — everything should match the reference as closely as Framer allows. We will do a side-by-side comparison. Approximations are not acceptable.



**Mobile responsiveness**

Every site must look correct at 390px (iPhone). You will screenshot every section at mobile and compare it against the reference before submitting. Do not submit without completing mobile QA.



**Clean Framer structure**

Use named Color Styles and Text Styles — no hardcoded inline values. Components should be reusable and the project should be easy for us to edit after handoff.



**Interactions and animations**

If the reference site has scroll animations, sticky navbars, hover states, or component interactions — replicate them. If something cannot be built natively in Framer, use a Marketplace component or a custom Code Component.



**No placeholder images**

If images are not provided in the brief, flag them with the correct dimensions and wait for assets. Do not publish with blank placeholders.



**Fast turnaround**

Standard sites (5–8 sections) should be completed within 24 hours of receiving the brief. We will communicate if timelines differ.



---



## Your Deliverables Per Project



When you submit, we need:



1. Live Framer staging URL

2. Screenshots of every section at desktop (1440px) and mobile (390px)

3. Side-by-side comparisons of your build vs the reference for each section

4. A short written note on anything you couldn't replicate exactly and why



---



You're a Good Fit If You



- Have strong hands-on experience building in Framer (not just designing — actually publishing sites)

- Can replicate layouts accurately without needing creative direction

- Understand Framer's breakpoint system, Stacks, Color Styles, Text Styles, and Code Components

- Are detail-obsessed — you notice when a padding value is 4px off

- Communicate clearly and flag issues early rather than submitting something half-done

- Can work independently from a brief with minimal back and forth



---



You're Not a Good Fit If You



- Are primarily a Figma or Webflow designer who's dabbled in Framer

- Need significant creative direction or hand-holding per project

- Are not comfortable working from a URL as a reference with no design file provided

- Cannot deliver mobile-responsive builds consistently



---

To Apply



Send us:



1. **Your Framer portfolio** — live URLs only, no Figma files or screenshots

2. **One example** of a site you replicated or closely matched to an existing design

3. **Your rate** — per project or hourly, whichever you prefer

4. **Your availability** and average turnaround time for a standard 6–8 section site



Applications without live Framer URLs will not be considered.

title: Video Editor
description:
Company: To Stoked 

Hours: 20–40 hours per week

Software Required: Primere Pro Or DaVinci Resolve

Location: Remote



Role Overview



We’re looking for a reliable, consistent video editor who edits in DaVinci Resolve or Adobe PP and understands color grading Slog 3, pacing, and clean social content.



This role focuses on editing short-form vertical videos, talking clips, and content libraries for service-based businesses (fencing, pools, automotive, etc.).

title: Sales Developement Representative
description:
Sales Development Representative (SDR) — US Companies, Remote Philippines

About Us

We run two US-based companies in the sourcing and supply chain space. One serves the CBD industry with hardware and packaging. The other serves supplement and nutraceutical brands with full-service sourcing, packaging, and logistics. Both companies source factory direct from China with American partners on the ground ensuring quality — and we pass the savings (20%+) to our customers.

We’re growing fast and need a sharp, self-motivated SDR to help us fill our VP of Sales’ calendar with qualified meetings. You’ll be the engine that drives new business for both companies.

The Role

You will own outreach for two sales programs running simultaneously. Your job is to generate interest and book meetings — not to close deals. We have a VP of Sales who handles closing. You fill his calendar.

You’ll be supported by AI-powered tools that handle
 personalization, sending, and deliverability automatically. Your focus is on the high-value work that AI can’t do: phone calls, LinkedIn relationship building, handling replies, overcoming objections, and booking meetings.

What You’ll Do

• Set up and manage our sales tech stack: 
 (lead enrichment), Instantly.ai 
 automation), 
 (contact database), HubSpot CRM, and Zapier (automations)

• Configure DNS records (SPF, DKIM, DMARC) for
 sending domains — we’ll provide a step-by-step guide

• Enrich lead lists using Clay — pull
s, phone numbers, company data, and generate AI-personalized
 openers for each prospect

• Build and manage cold
 campaigns in Instantly — import leads, set up sequences, monitor deliverability

• Make 40-60 cold calls per day to cannabis growers and supplement brand decision makers using provided scripts

• Send 20-30 LinkedIn connection requests and follow-up messages per day

• Triage and respond to
 replies — flag interested leads, handle objections, and book VP of Sales calls within 1 hour of a positive reply

• Book 5-10 VP of Sales meetings per week (this is the #1 metric we care about)

• Maintain HubSpot CRM with accurate pipeline data, call notes, and deal stages

• Send a structured weekly performance report every Friday

Requirements

• Excellent spoken and written English — you’ll be calling US-based business owners and
ing C-level executives

• Experience with cold calling and/or cold
 outreach (B2B sales development preferred)

• Comfortable setting up and learning new software tools quickly (Clay, Instantly, Apollo, HubSpot, Zapier)

• Basic technical skills — able to follow a step-by-step guide to configure DNS records and connect tools via API/Zapier

• Self-motivated and organized — you’ll work independently with a weekly check-in, not daily supervision

• Available to work US business hours (Eastern or Pacific time zone — evening/night shift Philippines time)

• Reliable internet connection and a quiet space for phone calls

Nice to Have (Not Required)

• Experience with 
, Instantly.ai, 
, or similar sales automation tools

• Familiarity with the supplement or CPG/packaging industries

• Experience setting up
 infrastructure (domains, DNS, warm-up)

• Previous experience booking meetings for a US-based sales team

Compensation & Details

• Pay: $
USD/month (based on experience), paid bi-weekly

• Performance bonus: $25–$50 per qualified VP of Sales meeting booked (on top of base)

• Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week, US business hours (evening shift PH)

• Location: Remote — Philippines only

• Start date: As soon as possible

• Long-term position — this is not a short-term project. We want someone who will grow with us.

What We Provide

• Complete outreach playbooks with scripts,
 templates, objection handling, and call scripts — you won’t be guessing what to say

• Pre-built lead lists (5,200+ growers + 40 supplement brands) ready to work

• AI-powered tools that handle
 personalization and sending — you focus on calls and relationships

• Step-by-step setup guides for every tool (Clay, Instantly, DNS, Zapier, HubSpot)

• A clear KPI framework so you always know exactly what success looks like

• Direct access to leadership — small company, no bureaucracy

How to Apply

Send a message with:

• A brief introduction (2-3 sentences about your background)

• Your experience with cold calling, cold
, or B2B sales development

• Any experience with sales tools (CRM,
 automation, lead databases)

• Your English proficiency (spoken and written) — we may ask for a short voice recording

• Your expected monthly salary in USD

Please include the word “TCI PACKAGING Applicant” in the subject of your
ed response.  Only applications with this
 subject sent to the below
 addresses will be assessed.





We review applications within 48 hours and aim to have the right person started within 1-2 weeks.

title: Facebook Ads & Google Ads Media Buyer (E-commerce Focus)
description:
About Us

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company passionate about delivering exceptional products to our customers. To continue scaling our business, we are looking for a highly motivated and skilled Media Buyer specializing in
 Ads and Google Ads to join our team. If you're analytical, results-driven, and have a proven track record in paid media, we want to hear from you!



Key Responsibilities

 Ads Media Buyer

~ Upload, launch, and manage
 ad campaigns for e-commerce products.

~ Analyze and report on campaign performance, providing actionable insights to improve results.

~ Monitor key metrics (ROAS, CTR, CPA) and optimize campaigns to achieve revenue and growth goals.

~ Stay up to date with
 Ads Manager updates, trends, and best practices.

~ Collaborate with the creative team to test and iterate ad creatives for better performance.



Google Ads Media Buyer

~ Create, upload, and launch Google Ads campaigns, including Search, Shopping, Display, and YouTube Ads.

~ Conduct keyword research, audience targeting, and campaign structuring to maximize ad effectiveness.

~ Monitor and optimize campaign performance, focusing on increasing ROAS and lowering CPA.

~ Generate detailed campaign performance reports and provide recommendations for scaling.

~ Stay informed about Google Ads trends, algorithm changes, and platform updates.



What We're Looking For

~ Proven experience managing
 Ads and Google Ads campaigns for e-commerce brands.

~ Strong analytical skills, with the ability to interpret data and make data-driven decisions.

~ Familiarity with tracking tools like Google Analytics,
 Pixel, and other attribution models.

~ Expertise in key metrics such as ROAS, CTR, CPA, and conversion rates.

~ Excellent communication and reporting skills.

~ Creative problem solver with attention to detail.

~ Ability to work independently and manage multiple campaigns simultaneously.



What We Offer

~ Competitive salary based on experience.

~ Opportunity to work with a dynamic and supportive team.

~ Flexible working hours and a remote-friendly environment.

~ Room for professional growth and development.

~ The chance to directly impact the success of a growing e-commerce brand.



How to Apply

1. Use “Meta and Google Ads Media Buyer” as the
 subject line.

2. Share your relevant experience in bullet points and align it with the key responsibilities listed above.

3. Indicate your starting rate.

4. Submit your resume and portfolio with case studies that clearly show ROAS, as this will be used to evaluate the effectiveness of your previous ad campaigns.

title: Operations & Logistics Virtual Assistant (Day-Shift)
description:
We are seeking 2 high-caliber Processing & Coordination Virtual Assistants to support a leading Australian mechanical services provider. The company specializes in comprehensive commercial and industrial refrigeration, heating, and air conditioning (HVAC/R) solutions, serving a diverse range of sectors including mining, healthcare, infrastructure, and retail across New South Wales and Queensland.



In this role, you will serve as an essential counterpart to the Australian-based team, managing the technical and administrative "engine room" of the business to ensure seamless operational growth.



Role Overview



As an Operations & Logistics VA, you will be responsible for high-volume back-end administration, data management, and supplier coordination. You will work within a secure virtual desktop environment (Azure/Windows 365) to maintain data sovereignty while ensuring all service and project workflows are executed with meticulous accuracy.



Tasks and Responsibilities



- Simpro Data Management: Manage the primary back-end of Simpro, including daily data entry, job processing, and operational reporting.

- Financial Processing & Xero: Execute data entry for packing slips and supplier invoices; perform consistent bank reconciliations and assist with Accounts Receivable/debt collection.

- Supplier Coordination: Act as a professional point of contact for approximately 12 main suppliers to request quotes, check part availability, and follow up on orders.

- Podium System Oversight: Monitor automation triggers (such as review requests) and manage soft-phone/text-based interactions within the Podium platform.

- SOP & Handbook Development: Assist in creating the company "blueprint" by maintaining a comprehensive Employee Handbook and documenting processes with training links.

- CRM & Task Management: Utilize Zoho for remote task tracking and Microsoft 365 (Teams/Outlook) for internal communication.

- Daily Coordination: Participate in mandatory daily cadence sessions with the Australian team to ensure business assimilation and alignment.



Qualifications: 



- Industry Experience: Minimum of 2 years of experience in administrative or VA roles, specifically within trade, construction, or high-volume service industries.

- Software Proficiency: High proficiency in Xero (specifically bank reconciliations) and Microsoft 365. Prior experience with Simpro is highly preferred (or similar systems like ServiceM8, Tradify or Aroflo).

- Communication Skills: Exceptional verbal and written English with a neutral accent suitable for professional daily interactions with Australian stakeholders.

- Technical Aptitude: Proven ability to work efficiently within a secured virtual desktop environment (Azure) and manage digital security tools like NordPass.

- Mindset & Work Ethic: An energetic, proactive "self-starter" who can learn complex systems via training modules rather than requiring constant supervision.

- Attention to Detail: Meticulous accuracy in managing data entry across integrated platforms (Simpro, Xero, Zoho) to ensure error-free reporting.



The Perks

- Comprehensive Leave & Allowances: Includes 10 days Annual Leave, 5 days Personal Leave, 10 Public Holidays, and a Birthday Gift Allowance.

- Remote & Stable Work: 100% remote work setup with a consistent dayshift arrangement in a long-term, stable position.

- Growth & Support: Access to comprehensive training materials, documented processes, and a friendly, no-drama team environment.

- Health & Benefits: Philhealth contributions (P1200 per 6 months) and the opportunity to work with high-profile, prestigious brands.



Application Process



Ready to Join Us?

title: Senior Accountant – Xero Expert
description:
[IMPORTANT: Failure to follow the application instructions will result in automatic disqualification.]



We are looking for a Senior Accountant who is still highly hands-on with bookkeeping tasks to join our growing international team.



We are specifically looking for someone who:

- Has senior-level accounting knowledge

- Is comfortable doing day-to-day bookkeeping work

- Can own the numbers while still doing the work themselves



What This Role Is

This role is ideal for someone who:

- Understands financial reporting and business performance

- But is also happy to:

> reconcile accounts

> clean up books

> process transactions

> work directly in Xero daily

You will be responsible for both execution AND insight.



What You’ll Do

- Hands-On Bookkeeping (Core Responsibility)

- Perform daily bookkeeping tasks inside Xero

- Reconcile bank accounts, credit cards, and transactions

- Clean up and maintain accurate financial records

- Handle transaction coding and categorization



Financial Management

- Maintain accurate general ledger

- Ensure financial data integrity across all accounts



Financial Reporting

Prepare:

- Monthly Profit & Loss

- Balance Sheet

- Cash Flow reports

- Identify trends and provide insights to management



Accounts Payable & Receivable

- Manage invoices, payments, and collections

- Track outstanding balances



Payroll Support

- Assist with payroll processing and accuracy



Tax & Compliance Support

- Assist with BAS and GST reporting

- Maintain compliance with Australian standards



Budgeting & Forecasting

- Support budgeting and financial planning

- Assist with cost tracking and projections



Xero Ownership

- Manage and maintain Xero daily

- Improve and optimize accounting processes



What We’re Looking For

- Senior Accountant (Hands-On)

- 3+ years experience in accounting/bookkeeping

- Must be comfortable doing both senior-level thinking AND daily bookkeeping tasks



Xero Expertise (Required)

- Strong working knowledge of Xero

Able to perform:

- reconciliation

- reporting

- account setup

- troubleshooting



Australian Accounting Knowledge (Preferred)

Experience with:

- BAS

- GST

- Australian compliance



Strong Accounting Fundamentals

Understanding of:

- accruals

- journal entries

- financial statements



Detail-Oriented & Organized

- High accuracy in financial records

- Strong time management skills



Communication Skills

- Clear English communication

- Ability to explain financial data simply



Bonus Points

- Experience with Australian clients

- CPA or accounting degree and certification

- Experience with growing businesses or startups

- Experience improving accounting systems or workflows



Why Join Us

- Fully remote role

- Work with an international team

- Stable, long-term opportunity

- Opportunity to grow into a Finance Lead role

- Make a real impact on business decisions



How to Apply

To be considered, you MUST submit:

1. CV

2. Portfolio (Google Drive Folder)

Include:

- Resume

- Sample financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet)

- Reconciliation samples

- Any dashboards or reports

Make sure access is set to “Anyone with the link”

3. Short Video (1–2 minutes)

Please answer:

- Your accounting experience

- Your experience with Xero

- Your experience with Australian clients

- Are you comfortable doing hands-on bookkeeping daily? (Important)



[Applications without ALL requirements will not be reviewed.]

title: Expert Video Editor - Davinci
description:
** PLEASE READ ALL THE INSTRUCTIONS & ONLY APPLY IF YOU HAVE EXTENSIVE VIDEO EDITING EXPERIENCE**



Are you a talented video editor with a passion for creating captivating, fast-paced social media videos? I’m looking for a skilled professional to finalize high-quality 1-2 minute videos for my social media platforms.



About the Role



I need a highly dependable, truly exceptional video editor who can learn to replicate my video editing style. This role involves quick turn around times and large amounts of footage. I need someone passionate about storytelling and who has a great eye for selecting the best 
nts out of hundreds (sometimes thousands) of clips and arranging them in a way that goes along with a voiceover in the most compelling and powerful way possible.



You'll be assisting my team of video editors by stepping in during the second half of the video creation process, working with raw, already chopped footage, voiceovers, and initial edits I’ve prepared to produce videos ready for another tea
mber to color grade. Each project will involve 20 minutes to 2 hours of pre-chopped footage, which you’ll sift through to select the best clips and create a 1–2 1/2 minute video that tells a compelling story. 



Our team includes a part time video color-grader and captioner so most likely you will not be color grading or captioning the final videos. You will be our expert clip arranger who can arrange the footage according to my voiceover in a compelling way, using only the very best pieces of footage available.



This is a per project roll that pays $35 USD a video, with 3-5 videos a week on average. Our video output fluctuates, so some weeks there may be more work available for you if you'd like it. 



My ideal video editor must be confident that they can create videos in my signature style:



Example 1: 

Example 2: 

Example 3: 





Key Responsibilities



- Edit and arrange video clips to align with pre-recorded voiceovers.



- Review and narrow down footage to select the most compelling clips.



- Craft engaging and visually appealing videos that flow naturally and tell a cohesive story.



- Incorporate relevant visuals such as screen recordings, maps, and on-screen text when necessary.



- Ensure videos feature dynamic intros/hooks to capture viewers' attention and match with video intros I've created in the past.



- Collaborate via DaVinci for seamless project sharing and updates.





What I’m Looking For



- Proven Expertise: Advanced video editing skills with a portfolio of engaging short-form content.



- Proficiency in DaVinci 



- Attention to Detail: Ability to identify and highlight the best 
nts in raw footage.



- Storytelling Skills: Strong sense of pacing and narrative structure.



- Social Media Savvy: Familiarity with the style and trends of platforms like TikTok and Instagram.



- An editor who can create videos in my signature style.





- What I Provide



- Raw footage and voiceovers for each project.



- Clear direction and collaboration throughout the editing process.



- Flexibility to foster creativity and innovation in the editing process.





How to Apply:



1. Change the subject line to how many years experience you have editing videos



2. (IMPORTANT) Provide links to 3-5 specific videos you've edited that showcase your abilities to create videos like my example videos. Please do not give any examples of talking-head style videos. 



3. Please send your portfolio



4. Answer the following questions:



- Kindly illustrate how the linked videos you've provided demonstrate your suitability for the role and why you would excel in editing travel and vlog videos.



- What software do you use to edit videos? And are you willing to use Davinci for an easier collaboration process?



- Do you have any other experience that will make you a perfect fit for the job?



- Do you feel confident that you can edit 3-5 high quality videos each week, for $35 USD a video?



- Are you open to doing a paid test task? 



Thank you for your time, and I look forward to chatting with you!

title: Senior Risk & Compliance Consultant (Fintech & Crypto)
description:
We need an expert who bridges the gap between Web2 Traditional Finance (Fiat Rails) and Web3 On-chain Compliance.

Your core mission is not just to be a "blocker," but to "design safe mechanisms that enable business velocity." You will ensure we pass the rigorous onboarding requirements of our banking partners (e.g., Cybrid's AML program review) while managing the operational risks of a high-volume payment platform.



Key Responsibilities

Compliance Program Build-out

Draft BSA/AML Policies from Scratch: Create internal compliance policy documents (CIP, AML, OFAC) that meet US banking standards. This is a prerequisite for going live with partners like Cybrid.

Define KYC/KYB Standards: Design tiered identity verification workflows for our dual-track business (B2B Agency + B2C Palau ID). Define limits and requirements for Tier 1 vs. Tier 2 users.

Regulatory Strategy: Assess licensing requirements (MTL/MSB/MiCA) for US, Canada, and EU markets, providing a strategic roadmap for the next 12-24 months.

Operational Risk & Fraud Prevention

ACH Risk Management: specifically for ACH Pull scenarios. Design logic to mitigate NSF (Insufficient Funds) and Unauthorized Returns (e.g., balance checks via Plaid, settlement holding periods).

On-Chain Risk Integration: Configure on-chain analysis tools (e.g., GoPlus, Chainalysis, Elliptic) to define blocking rules for high-risk wallet addresses.

Transaction Monitoring: Set up velocity limits and alert rules for suspicious activities; handle Suspicious Activity Reports (SARs) if necessary.

Partner Enablement

Due Diligence (DD): Represent the company in handling compliance inquiries from upstream banking partners and infrastructure providers (Cybrid, Hex Trust), assisting in completing complex DD questionnaires.

Vendor Assessment: Evaluate the compliance robustness of new payment rails (e.g., European SEPA, Asian local payouts).



Requirements

Experience: 5+ years of risk/compliance experience in Fintech or Crypto Exchanges. Must have hands-on experience with US Banking Rails (ACH/Wire).

Expertise:

Deep knowledge of FinCEN, OFAC sanctions, and AML workflows.

Strong understanding of the "FBO Account" model and the legal boundaries of a "Money Transmitter."

Understanding of stablecoin (USDC) minting and burning flows.

Tool Stack: Familiarity with industry-standard tools like Persona (Identity), Plaid (Bank Auth), and Chainalysis/TRM Labs (Crypto AML).

Mindset: Ability to balance "Compliance Requirements" with "User Experience." We don't need a bureaucrat; we need a builder who offers solutions.



Bonus Points

Certified Anti-Money Laundering Specialist (CAMS) certification.

Experience helping startups successfully onboard with Zero Hash, Cybrid, Circle, or Stripe.

Knowledge of RNS.ID (Palau Digital Residency) or similar sovereign identity projects.

Familiarity with India TDS tax regulations or Philippines cross-border remittance laws.

title: Marketing Manager
description:
Job Overview:

We are seeking a creative and results-driven Marketing Manager to lead marketing initiatives and drive brand growth. The ideal candidate will develop and execute strategic marketing plans across digital and traditional channels, manage campaigns from ideation to execution, and analyze performance to optimize results. You will collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Creative teams to ensure brand consistency and maximize outreach.



Primary Responsibilities:



Develop and implement comprehensive marketing strategies to increase brand awareness, drive customer acquisition, and support sales goals.



Plan and manage multi-channel marketing campaigns, including digital (SEO, SEM, social media,
) and offline (events, partnerships, print).



Conduct market research to identify customer trends, competitive landscape, and opportunities for growth.



Oversee content creation for websites, blogs, newsletters, social media, and advertising campaigns.



Manage and optimize digital marketing tools and platforms (CRM, marketing automation, analytics).

Excellent communication, project management, and organizational skills.

title: DevOps Engineer
description:
Job Description:



As a DevOps Engineer at the Republic of Palau's Digital Residency Program (RNS.ID), you will be a crucial part of our team, responsible for managing and optimizing our cloud infrastructure. Your expertise in AWS, GCP, and Terraform will be pivotal in ensuring the reliability, scalability, and security of our Web3 ID platform.



Key Qualifications:



    Proficiency in Amazon Web Services (AWS) and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).



    Strong expertise in Terraform for infrastructure as code.



    Proven experience in maintaining and optimizing cloud-based infrastructure.



    Excellent problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.



    Ability to work collaboratively in a dynamic environment.



    Familiarity with DevOps best practices.



Responsibilities:



-Infrastructure Management: Design, deploy, and maintain AWS and GCP infrastructure to support the Web3 ID platform. Utilize Terraform for infrastructure provisioning and configuration. Monitor and optimize cloud resources for performance and cost-efficiency.



-Automation and CI/CD: Develop and maintain automation scripts and pipelines for continuous integration and continuous delivery (CI/CD). Implement containerization and orchestration technologies (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) to streamline deployment processes.



-Security and Compliance: Collaborate with the security team to implement and maintain security best practices. Conduct regular security assessments and ensure compliance with relevant regulations and standards.



-Monitoring and I
 Response: Set up and manage monitoring and alerting systems to proactively identify and address issues. Investigate and resolve infrastructure-related i
, conducting root cause analysis.



-Documentation: Create and update infrastructure documentation and procedures. Document i
 reports and resolutions for knowledge sharing.



Qualifications:



-Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field (or equivalent   work experience).

-Minimum of 3 years of experience as a DevOps Engineer, Cloud Engineer, or similar role.

-AWS and GCP certifications are a plus.

-Strong understanding of cloud architecture and best practices.

-Familiarity with Web3 and blockchain technologies is advantageous.



Join RNS.ID and contribute to our mission of revolutionizing digital identity through Web3 technology.

title: Appointment Setters - $50 per Zoom Call
description:
Talented Appointment Setters - Earn $200 to $500 per day 



I’m expanding a Google Maps lead-generation service and need confident phone pros to lock in owner-attended Zoom calls with local Australian businesses. I’ll supply a proven script, talk tracks, rebuttals and a Calendar link; you focus purely on dialing straight from Google Map searches, qualifying and scheduling.



Who you’ll be calling

Think independent operators and small chains across Healthcare (physios, dentists, chiros), Home & Commercial services (cleaners, landscapers, gutter crews), Trades (builders, sparkies, plumbers, glaziers), plus Automotive repairers and Professional firms such as lawyers or accountants. Call directly from Google Map searches, simple.



Must have your own voip phone system and reliable internet to call Australian businesses.



What you’re offering them

A free Google Maps visibility audit that pinpoints why they aren’t ranking in the local pack, plus easy DIY fixes or a paid option with my team. Your goal is a 15-minute Zoom session where I or another strategist deliver that audit live.



Pay structure

• $50 AUD for every Zoo
eting that the prospect attends.

• Typical setters average 100+ completed calls daily, so $200–$400 AUD is realistic.

• Commissions are tallied and paid every Thursday based on the previous week's results.



Your toolkit

• Ready-to-use script & objection flow

• Calender access for seamless booking

• Training video at 
 for product context



Deliverables (acceptance criteria)

1. Prospect fits target industries and is a decision maker.

2. Zoom slot booked in Calendar with correct time zone.

3. Prospect attends the call (status automatically confirmed in Zoom/CRM).

4. Brief call note entered in spreadsheet



If you’re persuasive on the phone, disciplined with follow-up and comfortable using a script, let’s get you dialing within 24 hours. Apply with a short note on your outbound experience and what phone dialer you have to call from.

title: Graphic Designer for Ecommerce Brand

What You’ll Be Doing:

Weekly / Recurring Tasks:

- Designing EDMs 
s) in Canva for Klaviyo

- Creating social media content (organic + paid ads)

- Single images

- Carousels

Campaign & Ad Hoc Work:

- Print design (flyers, posters, event materials)

Skills & Tools Required

- Dropbox – organising, naming, and exporting files correctly



We’re Looking For Someone Who:

Role Details

To Apply, Please Include:

 designs, and any print work)

- Start your application with “Sea Moss” so we know you’ve read this



If you’re looking for a consistent, long-term role with a growing brand, we’d love to hear from you!



Please note: Shortlisted candidates will be given a small paid test task.
