title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
Job Posting

Real Estate Transaction Coordinator – iVision Real Estate

Remote or Hybrid | Part-Time to Full-Time | Precision, Communication & Compliance

Do you have a passion for keeping deals on track and paperwork perfectly aligned?

iVision Real Estate, a top-performing brokerage led by Broker & Visionary Marie Matta-Isona, is seeking a Transaction Coordinator (TC) who thrives in a fast-paced real estate environment. This role is ideal for a highly organized, detail-obsessed professional who can take contracts from accepted offer to closing—seamlessly, accurately, and with grace under pressure.

We’re looking for someone who understands that a smooth transaction is just as important as a successful sale, and who is ready to be a trusted behind-the-scenes partner for our team, clients, and cooperating professionals. 

Your Responsibilities Will Include:

• Manage real estate transactions from contract to close using Transaction Desk, SISU, and Follow Up Boss.

• Coordinate and communicate with attorneys, paralegals, title companies, cooperating agents, lenders, and clients throughout every step of the process.

• Enter and maintain data in the MLS (new listings, status updates, and compliance documents).

• Track contract deadlines and ensure all parties meet contingency timelines (e.g., inspections, mortgage approvals, closing dates).

• Ensure all documents are complete, signed, and properly stored within our digital systems.

• Update clients with weekly progress reports, timelines, and next steps to keep them informed and confident.

• Collaborate with the lead agent and support staff to keep everything moving smoothly and proactively flag any issues.

• Maintain internal checklists and workflows to meet compliance standards and ensure a high level of service.

What You Bring:

• Prior experience as a Real Estate Transaction Coordinator or related real estate admin role.

• Proficiency or willingness to quickly become proficient in:

o MLS systems

o SISU

o Transaction Desk

o Follow Up Boss

• Outstanding attention to detail and task management.

• Clear, professional communication skills—both written and verbal.

• Ability to multi-task and manage multiple transactions at once without dropping the ball.

• A proactive mindset—able to anticipate needs and solve problems before they arise.

• Familiarity with Connecticut real estate practices and contract timelines (preferred but not required). Include the word SILLY123 in the subject of your application



Why Join iVision Real Estate?

At iVision Real Estate, Your Vision is Our Work. We’re committed to delivering a seamless, professional experience to our clients—and we know that smooth, organized transactions are essential to that promise. As part of our team, you’ll be empowered to work independently while also being deeply supported by a visionary broker and a mission-driven company culture.

We are growing fast, and this role will evolve with us. There is opportunity for growth, leadership, and long-term impact here.

Ready to Ensure Every Transaction Closes Like Clockwork?

Apply today with your resume and a short message explaining why you’re the perfect Transaction Coordinator for iVision Real Estate.

title: Planner & Planner Inserts Designer
description:
THIS IS NOT A REGULAR DESIGN JOB



We're not looking for someone to execute a brief and disappear. We're looking for a designer who lives and breathes planners — someone who has opinions about layouts, notices what's missing in the market, and gets genuinely excited about designing a brand new themed monthly spread. If you've never used a discbound planner, this role is not for you.



---



WHO WE ARE



FeroniArt Planners is an Amazon FBA brand in the discbound planner niche. We have 600+ active listings, ship 1,500+ orders every month, and our catalog covers discbound notebooks, planner covers, inserts, and accessories — all built around the disc-ring system used by brands like Happy Planner, ARC, and Levenger Circa.



We're a small two-person team. We move fast, make decisions quickly, and we're serious about becoming the #1 discbound planner brand on Amazon. We're not there yet — and this role is a big part of how we get there.



---



WHAT WE NEED



Our existing catalog has good bones but needs a design upgrade. Some inserts are outdated. Some covers don't reflect where the market is heading. We're also launching entirely new product lines — themed insert collections, premium covers, and new categories we haven't touched yet.



We need a designer who can take ownership across all of this:



1. Refresh & Update Existing Designs

- Review our current insert catalog and identify what needs updating

- Redesign dated layouts to match current planner trends: clean typography, intentional white space, functional structure

- Maintain brand consistency across the catalog while elevating the overall look



2. New Undated & Dated Insert Collections

- Design undated monthly, weekly, and daily inserts in themed collections — nature, botanical, minimal, seasonal, and more

- Design dated versions of the same inserts for annual releases

- Work across all standard discbound sizes: Letter (8.5x11 / 11-disc), Classic (7x9.25 / 9-disc), Half Letter (5.5x8.5 / 8-disc), Mini (4.5x7 / 7-disc)

- Deliver both native-size PDFs and letter-size home-print versions for every insert



3. New Specialty Insert Categories

- Home management: meal planning, cleaning schedules, household trackers

- Business & productivity: project planning, meeting notes, goal setting

- Hobby & lifestyle: reading logs, fitness trackers, travel journals, gratitude pages

- Student: class schedules, assignment trackers, study planners

- Each category should feel like a curated collection — not a random assortment of pages



4. Planner Cover Design

- Design print-ready and supplier-ready cover files for new product launches

- Work with fabric swatches and material references — we're launching woven fabric and textured PU leather covers

- Create product mockups for Amazon listings and internal review



5. Amazon Listing Visuals

- Design infographic images that clearly communicate product features, size, disc compatibility, and use case

- Create A+ Content modules: feature highlights, size comparison charts, brand story visuals

- Work alongside our Amazon Listing Specialist — you design, they upload and optimize



---



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



- Someone who actually uses planners — or at minimum, deeply understands how people use them

- A designer who follows trends: what's selling, what's emerging, what's overdone

- Comfortable working independently — we don't micromanage, but we expect initiative and consistency

- Detail-oriented: correct bleed, proper margins, clean exports — every single time

- Someone who wants to grow with the brand, not just complete tasks and move on



---



SKILLS REQUIRED



- Adobe InDesign — required for all insert and print file production

- Adobe Photoshop — required for listing images and infographics

- Canva — for quick Amazon visuals and mockups

- Strong understanding of print specs: bleed, safe zones, CMYK vs RGB

- Adobe Illustrator — a plus for cover and vector work

- Experience designing for Amazon listings — a strong plus

- Familiarity with discbound planners (Happy Planner, ARC, Levenger Circa) — a strong plus



---



COMPENSATION



- $75 paid trial task for shortlisted candidates (approx. 2–3 hours) — details below

- $400–500/month part-time (approx. 20 hours/week)

- Path to full-time ($700–900/month) based on output and performance

- Long-term role — we're building a team, not filling a slot



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message that includes:

- A brief introduction — who you are and what kind of design work you love most,

- Your current country of residence,

- A portfolio link — we want to see planner inserts, stationery, or print work specifically

- One specific observation about FeroniArt's current products or listings on Amazon

- A sample of your planner insert design work — a page layout, weekly spread, or any print-ready planner page you have designed before



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



---



TRIAL TASK



After we review your application and portfolio, shortlisted candidates will receive an existing FeroniArt undated monthly calendar InDesign file along with a $75 payment for their time. At that stage, we will ask you to:



1. Study the file — understand how it's structured and how the design works

2. Design a brand new themed undated monthly calendar in the same format — we will provide the theme

3. Export two versions: Classic size (7x9.25) print-ready PDF + Letter size (8.5x11) home-print PDF

4. Design one Amazon listing infographic for this insert — show the size, disc compatibility, and one key selling point

5. Briefly explain the design choices you made



We're evaluating your InDesign skills, your design thinking, and your understanding of what makes a planner insert actually work — not just look good.

title: Apparel Production Coordinator (Aus Fashion Brand)
description:
Merchandise Administration Coordinator

Global headwear brand — Remote (must work 9am–5p
lbourne / AEST Mon–Fri)

 Pay: $245 USD per week (paid weekly)

Contract: Ongoing (we’re looking for someone long-term who can grow into more senior merchandising/admin responsibilities).

Start: ASAP / by mutual agreement.



Love merchandising, data and making product launches run smoothly? We’re looking for a tidy-minded merch admin who lives in PLM, gets inventory reporting, and has real-world experience in fashion/accessories/footwear. This is a hands-on, highly visible role — you’ll sit at the intersection of Product, Sales, Customer Service and Inventory and help keep the engine running.



Why this role is great

- Work with a global headwear brand and play a key role in product launches and program execution.

- Remote, but fully aligned to Melbourne hours (so you’re paid to collaborate with senior merchandisers and cross-functional teams in real time).

- Weekly pay, stable ongoing contract — ideal for merch admins who want reliable hours and a clear scope of work.



What you’ll own

- PLM data creation & maintenance — create and manage product MIDs/attributes, season/collection fields, program and custom MIDs, and ensure data architecture supports commercial reporting and forecasting.

- Order form & program setup — develop accurate order forms for launches, confirm deadlines, and ensure global MIDs are created in advance of programs.

- Inventory & sales reporting — produce weekly SOH, NOS/ATP, residual stock, sell-through and weeks-cover reporting; support wholesale and B2B reporting.

- Global range & program support — manage cancelled MIDs/program communications, post program wrap-ups, assist with global launches and forecasts.

- Cross-team collaboration — liaise with Product, Sourcing, Sales, Customer Service and Master Data teams to keep everyone aligned.

- Continuous improvement — spot data gaps, propose fixes, and improve the PLM/master data setup for smoother reporting and fewer exceptions.



What is a Product MID (short and useful)

A product MID — short for Material ID (also called Master Item ID or Style ID) — is the single, system-level identifier for a product family in your PLM/ERP.



- It’s the master record for a style or concept; individual SKUs/barcodes are created from that master.

- Typical MID fields: season, collection, product name/description, category/family, colour range, size range, composition/materials, BOM/components, cost, vendor/sourcing info, HS code/GTIN, images, and launch + sales end dates.

- Why it matters: the MID is the single source of truth for launches, costing, customs/program tracking, ordering and reporting. Clean MIDs = fewer exceptions, faster launches, and reliable inventory & sell-through reporting.



What we need from you (must-haves):

- PLM experience — essential. You’ve used PLM day-to-day (MID creation, attribute input, order form creation).

- Fashion / accessories / footwear experience — essential. You’ve worked in retail/wholesale merchandising or product admin for apparel, footwear or accessories.

- Strong Excel and data skills. Comfortable with data entry, cleanups, pivot tables and basic reporting.

- Excellent English communication. You’ll be collaborating heavily with Australia-based teams.

- Organised, accurate, and deadline-driven. You manage high volumes of product data without dropping the ball.

- Availability: Must be available 9:00am–5:00p
lbourne time (AEST/AEDT) Mon–Fri.



Nice-to-haves:

- SAP experience highly regarded — not essential, but a big plus.

- Experience with BI/HANA or other reporting tools.

- Knowledge of master data best-practices and product lifecycle.

- Previous work with global program launches and sourcing teams.



What success looks like (first 3 months):

- PLM inputs for new programs and customs are timely and accurate.

- Order forms and program deadlines are consistently correct and shared on time.

- Weekly inventory and sell-through reports delivered on schedule, with clear, actionable commentary.

- Fewer data exceptions and faster program wrap-ups thanks to cleaner master data.



How to apply (please be concise)



1. When you apply, send:

- Short cover note (2–4 sentences): why you’re a fit and confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- CV with recent merch/admin roles highlighted.

- Brief PLM summary (system name, how long you used it, and 3 core PLM tasks you owned).

- Example/report: a short description (or a redacted sample) of an inventory or sell-through report you created.



2. Screening questions (answer these in your application):

- Name the PLM system(s) you’ve used, years of experience, and the top 3 PLM tasks you owned.

- Do you have any SAP experience? If yes, describe briefly.

- Confirm you can work 9am–5p
lbourne time.

- Are you comfortable with the weekly pay of $245 USD/week?

title: Wordpress Custom Plugin developer
description:
We're seeking an experienced WordPress plugin developer to maintain and enhance our custom MHC Plugin - a healthcare e-commerce integration system connecting our WooCommerce store with external provider APIs.



THE PLUGIN:

Our custom plugin handles patient eligibility verification, healthcare provider API integration, custom WooCommerce checkout workflows, order processing with Good Faith Estimates (GFE), patient-provider matching, and HIPAA-compliant data management. It's a mission-critical system serving real patients.



YOUR ROLE:

• Maintain and update the existing plugin (currently v3.11)

• Implement new features and modifications as requested

• Debug and fix production issues quickly

• Integrate with external healthcare REST APIs

• Modify WooCommerce checkout flows and order processing

• Create custom admin interfaces and settings pages

• Test all changes on staging before production deployment

• Provide clear documentation and progress updates



TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:

? 3+ years WordPress plugin development (MUST HAVE)

? Strong PHP OOP skills (classes, namespaces, hooks, filters)

? WooCommerce customization experience (checkout, orders, products)

? REST API integration experience (consuming external APIs)

? Excellent English communication (written and verbal)

? Reliable and responsive (24-hour response time)

? Available for occasional urgent fixes



BONUS SKILLS:

• Healthcare/HIPAA-compliant systems experience

• Telehealth or medical e-commerce platforms

• Git/GitHub version control

• JavaScript frameworks (React, Vue)

• Database optimization



RECENT WORK EXAMPLES:

• Modified button positioning on WooCommerce thank-you page

• Converted date picker to text input with auto-formatting for mobile

• Integrated patient data submission to external healthcare API

• Custom order status workflows and GFE generation



COMMUNICATION EXPECTATIONS:

• Daily or every-other-day progress updates

• Ask questions when requirements are unclear (we value clarity!)

• Available for video calls for complex features

• Document all code changes

• Responsive during US business hours (PST)



WORK ENVIRONMENT:

• Staging platform for all testing before production

• SSH access to server provided

• Flexible hours, work on your schedule

• Direct communication with business owner

• Long-term ongoing relationship (not a one-time gig)



THIS IS FOR YOU IF:

? You write clean, maintainable code

? You understand healthcare applications require precision

? You communicate proactively and ask good questions

? You're comfortable with existing codebases

? You deliver quality work on time

? You take pride in your work



THIS IS NOT FOR YOU IF:

? You need constant hand-holding

? You can't communicate clearly in English

? You disappear without updates

? You're still learning WordPress plugin development

title: Google Ads Specialist (Search & Performance) – Long-Term Opportunity
description:
Google Ads Specialist (Search & Performance) – Long-Term Opportunity



We are looking for a results-driven Google Ads specialist who understands how to generate real leads and measurable outcomes — not just set up campaigns.



Our team builds high-performance marketing systems for businesses across the U.S. and Canada, combining paid traffic, funnels, and automation to drive consistent growth.



This role is for someone who wants to be part of a long-term team and work on campaigns that are structured, optimized, and built to perform.



Key Responsibilities:

- Plan, build, and manage Google Ads campaigns (Search, Display, and basic YouTube if applicable)

- Perform keyword research and structure campaigns effectively

- Write and optimize high-performing ad copy

- Monitor and improve performance (CPC, CTR, conversions, cost per lead)

- Set up and manage conversion tracking (Google Tag, events, integrations)

- Optimize landing pages in collaboration with the team

- Continuously test, refine, and scale campaigns based on data



This role is focused on performance, optimization, and consistent improvement.



What We’re Looking For:

- Proven experience managing Google Ads campaigns (real results required)

- Strong understanding of campaign structure, targeting, and bidding strategies

- Ability to analyze performance data and make decisions based on metrics

- Experience with lead generation campaigns (service-based businesses preferred)

- Ability to work independently and execute efficiently

- Clear and professional communication



Additional Advantages:

- Experience working with multiple accounts or agency environments

- Familiarity with CRM systems such as GoHighLevel

- Understanding of landing page optimization and conversion rate improvement

- Experience with remarketing and audience strategies



Important:



This is not a beginner role.

We are looking for someone who is confident managing campaigns, optimizing performance, and making data-driven decisions without step-by-step guidance.



You should be comfortable taking ownership of results.



Compensation & Work Setup:

- Part-time to start (with fast path to full-time)

- 20 hours per week initially

- $400 – $800/month (part-time)

- $1,000 – $1,800/month (full-time)

- Performance-based bonuses

- Flexible working hours

- Daily overlap required: between 8:00 AM – 10:00 AM Eastern Time (approximately 15 minutes per day, exact time coordinated with the team)



Growth Opportunity:



We are building a core team.

Strong performers will take on larger budgets, more accounts, and increased responsibility over time.



Hiring Process:

- Short interview

- Paid test task ($15 USD, fixed price) to evaluate real skills



The test task will be a small, real-world Google Ads scenario and should take approximately 30–60 minutes to complete.



How to Apply:



Please include ALL of the following:



- Your experience with Google Ads (what types of campaigns have you managed?)

- 2–3 examples of campaigns (include results if possible)

- What types of campaigns you specialize in (search, local, e-commerce, etc.)

- Write “SEARCH” at the top of your application



Final Note:



We move fast.

We value people who take initiative, think in terms of results, and take ownership of their work.

We are looking for long-term tea
mbers — consistency and reliability are extremely important to us.

We are actively hiring and looking to move forward quickly.

title: Steel Fabrication Estimator — Remote (US Projects)
description:
Steel Fabrication Estimator — Remote (US Projects)

Location: Remote

Schedule: US business hours (night shift if based in Philippines/Asia)

Compensation: $900–$1,100/month USD, full-time salary

Start: Immediately

About the Role

We're hiring a steel fabrication estimator to run the full bid cycle for a US-based metal fabrication shop. This is not just a takeoff role — you will own the entire process from receiving plans to closing awarded work.

You will be the primary point of contact with US general contractors. You need to communicate professionally, respond quickly, and represent the shop as if you were sitting in the front office.

What You'll Do

Review incoming bid invitations and construction documents

Perform quantity takeoffs for structural steel, misc metals, handrails, stairs, railings, balconies, and similar

Prepare material and labor cost estimates

Build and submit complete bid packages

Communicate directly with general contractors — RFIs, clarifications, scope questions, and follow-up

Track active bids, awarded jobs, and pipeline

Follow up on submitted bids to maximize close rate

Requirements

Minimum 2 years of US steel fabrication estimating experience — this is non-negotiable. We cannot train you on US pricing, standards, or GC communication. You must already know how this works.

Proficiency in PlanSwift, Bluebeam, or similar takeoff software — you must have your own licensed software or be willing to provide your own

Experience with structural steel AND miscellaneous metals (not just one)

Professional spoken and written English — you will
 and potentially call American general contractors. Clear, professional communication is critical.

Ability to work during US business hours

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for calls

Nice to Have

FabSuite or Tekla experience

Experience working directly with a fabrication shop (not just a detailing or BIM firm)

Familiarity with AISC standards

Experience managing or mentoring other estimators

How to Apply

Send a sample takeoff or estimate you've completed for a US steel project. This is required — applications without a work sample will not be reviewed.

A BOQ, PlanSwift/Bluebeam takeoff, pricing sheet, or bid package all work. You may redact client names if needed.

Tell us:

How many years of US steel estimating experience you have

What software you use

Your expected monthly salary in USD

Your availability to start

We review samples first, resumes second. Show us what you can do.

title: Experience Email Marketer
description:
ABOUT DISPENZA

Dispenza has quickly become one of the largest marketing agencies in the rapidly-growing emerging market of cannabis as it quickly legalizes state by state in the Americas. As the market matures, we are on a mission to help change how the market operates, leaving the more questionable activities done by current market leaders and emerge as the first marketing agency and platform that values our customers while simultaneously delivering business-changing results to our clients.



JOB OVERVIEW

We’re looking for an experience
 Marketer to support ongoing campaign execution, lifecycle marketing, and retention strategy. This role focuses on building and optimizing
 campaigns, automations, SMS, and Wallet/ePass messaging to drive engagement, retention, and revenue.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

- Plan, build, and execute
 marketing campaigns, including one-off broadcasts and automated lifecycle flows

- Develop and manage automations such as welcome series, abandoned cart, re-engagement, and retention sequences

- Segment audiences and implement targeted messaging strategies based on customer behavior and lifecycle stage

- Design and run A/B tests on subject lines, content, timing, and campaign structure to improve performance

- Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance (open rates, CTR, conversions, and revenue attribution)

- Translate performance data into actionable insights and optimization strategies

- Create clear, concise performance reports with recommendations for continuous improvement

- Support Wallet/ePass and SMS campaign initiatives as part of a broader retention strategy

- Ensure all campaigns are aligned with brand voice, compliance standards, and business goals



TEAM COLLABORATION

- Work closely with project managers, designers, and stakeholders to execute campaigns efficiently

- Participate in team reviews to evaluate performance and identify opportunities for improvement

- Communicate updates proactively and flag blockers, risks, or optimization opportunities early



REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- 3–5 years of experience in
 marketing

- Hands-on experience with platforms such as Klaviyo, HubSpot, Mailchimp, or Salesforce

- Proven track record managing high-volume
 lists and driving measurable revenue impact

- Strong understanding of segmentation, lifecycle marketing, and customer journey mapping

- Experience building and optimizing high-performing campaigns and automations

- Analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable strategies

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Strong communication skills with the ability to provide clear updates and ask thoughtful questions



DESIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

- Experience with retention marketing in eCommerce or DTC brands

- Familiarity with SMS and/or Wallet (ePass) marketing campaigns

- Basic design awareness and experience working with templates or tools like Figma or Canva

- Experience in regulated industries (e.g., cannabis is a plus, but not required)



COMPENSATION

$500-$900 starting depending on experience.



SCHEDULE

- 8 hour shift, Monday to Friday, 7:00am to 4:00pm Philippine Time.

- Minimal overtime during weekdays and weekends will be expected as part of salary



Dispenza is proud to be an equal opportunity employer committed to a diverse and inclusive work environment. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, wordpressage, marital status, disability, veteran status or any other basis protected by law.



HOW TO APPLY

Please fill out the following form in order for your application to be considered: 



Good luck!

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands

title: No-Code Automation Specialist — Make.com / Airtable / Softr
description:
ABOUT US

We're a boutique digital studio based in New Zealand, building a purchaser portal product for residential property developers. The platform takes buyers from contract signing through to homeownership — automated construction updates, document delivery, settlement preparation, handover, and post-settlement defect management.

The architecture is fully designed. We now need someone to help us build it.



ABOUT THE ROLE

This is a hands-on build role. You'll be working through a documented set of automation flows, connecting our tools, and making sure data moves cleanly between systems at the right time.

The stack is defined. The flows are mapped. We need a specialist who can translate specs into working builds — without needing their hand held on every step.

This is project-based to start, with strong potential for ongoing work as we replicate the system across additional property developments.



WHAT YOU'LL BUILD


 — this is the core of the role

We have 9 automation flows designed and documented. You'll build them, test them, and write the SOPs. Triggers come from Airtable (record changes, checkbox ticks, date-based watches). Actions connect to Resend (transactional
), HubSpot, Softr, and PandaDoc.

Examples of flows you'll build:



Purchaser onboarding (portal access ? welcome
 ? CRM record creation)

Milestone update triggers (checkbox tick ? personalised
 ? portal stage update)

Document distribution (visibility flag ?
 notification or signature request)

Settlement preparation sequence (date-based drip: 14 days, 7 days, 1 day)

Issue submission routing (form ? acknowledgement
 ? internal alert)

Handover trigger (milestone ? portal unlock ? welcome home
)



Airtable

The primary database. You'll help us refine table structure, configure views, and build formula fields. Everything downstream depends on clean data here — structure matters more than speed.

Resend (transactional
)

Our outbound
 layer. You'll connect Resend to Make triggers, configure dynamic variables (purchaser name, development, unit number, dates), and test delivery. Some templates will need prompt logic for AI-generated personalisation — you'll help wire that up.

Prompt logic / AI integration

Some flows include a Claude step for things like issue summaries and
 draft generation. You'll help configure the prompt inputs, test outputs, and make sure they sit cleanly inside the automation flow.

Documentation

Every flow you build needs a clear SOP in Notion. We work async — if it's not documented, it doesn't exist.



THE RIGHT PERSON

You're a strong fit if you:



Have built complex, multi-step 
 scenarios from scratch — not just tweaked templates

Are comfortable in Airtable as a relational database (linked records, rollups, formulas, filtered views, Watch Records module)

Understand transactional
 mechanics — triggers, variable injection, delivery logic, error states

Can read a written spec or flow diagram and build from it without constant back-and-forth

Work async-first, document as you go, and flag blockers early rather than quietly

Ask good questions before starting, not after building the wrong thing



Bonus (not required, but valued):



Experience with HubSpot (contacts, pipelines,
 templates)

Experience with Softr or similar no-code portal builders

Experience with PandaDoc (templates, tokens, webhooks)

Experience with Resend specifically (not just general transactional
)





WHAT THIS IS NOT



Not a development role — no coding required (though comfort with HTML/CSS in
 templates is a plus)

Not a design role — UI design is handled separately

Not a "figure it out from scratch" role — the architecture exists; we need someone who can build to spec





ENGAGEMENT DETAILS



Type: Project-based to start, strong potential for ongoing retainer

Location: Remote / fully async

Hours: Approximately 30–50 hours for the initial build phase

Timezone: NZ business hours overlap appreciated but not essential — we care about output, not online time

Communication: We use Notion for documentation and async updates





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, please answer these four questions in your application:




 example — describe the most complex scenario you've built. What triggered it? What did it do? How many steps/modules? What was the outcome?

Airtable depth — rate yourself (beginner / intermediate / advanced) and give one specific example of a relational structure you've built or configured.

Transactional
 — which tools have you worked with (Resend, Postmark, Mailgun, HubSpot, other)? Describe one flow where
 was triggered by a data event.

Softr- Do you have experience?

Rate and availability — your hourly rate or preferred engagement model, and your current availability.



Applications without a 
 example will not be shortlisted.

description:
You are a natural closer. You do not just make calls. You build relationships, ask the right questions, and guide business owners to a decision. If you are looking for a role where your income grows with your performance, keep reading.



ABOUT US



We are a US-based digital agency that builds websites, CRMs, and marketing automation systems for local service businesses like HVAC companies, landscapers, construction firms, law firms, and med spas. Our clients are small business owners across the United States who need help getting more leads and converting them into customers. We have been operating for multiple years, have a growing team of virtual assistants in the Philippines, and are looking for a driven sales professional to help us scale revenue.



WHAT YOU WILL DO EVERY DAY



- Prospect and cold call US-based local service businesses from targeted lead lists using our CRM platform. You will research prospects before calling, personalize your outreach, and log every interaction in the CRM with detailed notes and next steps. Daily call volume target is 40-60 outbound dials.



- Run discovery calls and Zoom presentations with interested business owners. You will follow a structured sales framework to uncover their pain points, present our solutions, handle objections, and close deals. You will record every call for coaching and quality review.



- Follow up with warm leads and inbound inquiries through phone,
, and text sequences inside our CRM. You will manage your own pipeline, move deals through stages, and maintain a follow-up cadence so no lead goes cold. You will provide a daily end-of-day pipeline report in Slack.



- Coordinate with the fulfillment team after closing a deal to ensure smooth client onboarding. You will introduce the client, confirm deliverables, and stay looped in during the first 30 days to protect the relationship.



REQUIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE



- At least 2 years of B2B sales experience with a track record of closing deals over the phone or on Zoom. You must be comfortable selling to US-based business owners and handling objections confidently.



- Fluent, near-native English with a neutral or American-leaning accent. This role requires 3-4 hours of live phone and video conversations per day with native English speakers. You must be clearly understood without difficulty.



- Experience using a CRM to manage a sales pipeline, track deal stages, and log activity. You do not need to know our specific platform, but you need to understand pipeline management and be comfortable learning new systems quickly.



SOFT SKILLS



- Resilient and coachable. You handle rejection without losing energy and apply feedback immediately.

- Self-motivated and disciplined. You do not need to be micromanaged to hit your call targets every day.

- Organized and detail-oriented. Your CRM notes are thorough, your pipeline is clean, and your follow-ups happen on time.

- Strong listener. You ask good questions and let the prospect talk before pitching.



BASIC SKILLS



- Professional-level spoken and written English (this is non-negotiable for this role)

- Comfortable with Zoom, Google Workspace, Slack, and Notion

- Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace with a quality headset

- Able to work during US business hours (Mountain Time, UTC-7)



DESIRED SKILLS AND EXPERIENCE



- Experience selling digital marketing, web design, or SaaS services to small businesses. If you already understand how to explain ROI on websites, CRMs, and marketing automation to a business owner, you will ramp up faster and earn commissions sooner.



- Experience with outbound prospecting tools like Apollo, Instantly, or similar platforms.



- Familiarity with consultative or solution-based selling frameworks (SPIN, Sandler, Challenger, or similar).



WORK SCHEDULE AND HOLIDAYS



This is a part-time role at 25 hours per week. You will work during US Mountain Time business hours (approximately 9 AM to 2 PM MT, which is 11 PM to 4 AM Manila Time). Specific hours can be adjusted based on performance and mutual agreement. After a 6-month probation period, you will receive 3 vacation days and 3 sick days per year. We observe most Filipino holidays except All Saints Day and All Souls Day.



SALARY



$5.00 per hour base pay (approximately $500/month at 25 hours per week) plus commission on every deal you close. Commission structure will be shared during the interview process. There is no cap on commissions. Top performers who demonstrate consistent results will be offered a path to full-time (40 hours per week) with increased base pay and higher commission tiers.



PERKS AND BENEFITS



- 13th month pay after probation period

- Cash equivalent for unused leave days

- Uncapped commission on closed deals

- Weekly pay during the first 2 months to build trust, then twice monthly

- All sales training, scripts, and frameworks provided

- Access to our CRM platform and sales tools at no cost to you



TRAINING PROVIDED



You will receive full training on our services, pricing, sales scripts, objection handling, and CRM workflows. We will also provide ongoing coaching through recorded call reviews and weekly 1-on-1s. You do not need to know our industry to start. You need to know how to sell.



CAREER POTENTIAL



This role starts part-time with a clear path to full-time based on performance. Top closers will have the opportunity to move into a Senior Account Executive role, manage a small sales team, and earn override commissions on deals closed by reps they train. Performance reviews and raise opportunities happen quarterly.



HOW TO APPLY



To apply, you must do the following. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



1. Put "I Close Deals" in the subject line of your application.



2. Record a 2-3 minute Loom video (
, it is free) where you do the following: introduce yourself, tell us about your B2B sales experience, and then pitch us on why a small business owner should invest in a new website. Pretend we are the business owner. Show us how you sell.



3. Send your application with the Loom link to 
 without the Loom video will not be considered. We are looking for people who follow instructions and can sell. This is your chance to show both.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT- WITH MARKETING EXPERIENCE!
description:
The **Executive & Marketing Operations VA** will manage the agency’s internal operations, client communications, influencer coordination, and marketing deliverables. This role requires someone who is **organized, tech-savvy, and confident in handling both administrative and marketing-related workflows**.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### **1. Admin & Executive Support**



- Manage daily calendar, inbox, and scheduling needs.

- Prepare meeting notes, agendas, and follow-ups.

- Keep internal systems organized (Google Drive, Slack, ClickUp).

- Handle contracts, invoices, and small administrative tasks.



### **2. Client & Partner Operations**



- Manage client onboarding (contracts, payments, onboarding forms).

- Schedule and coordinate weekly client check-ins.

- Update dashboards, campaign trackers, and reports.

- Send weekly performance recaps and maintain records.



### **3. Creator & Influencer Operations (Influencer Farming™)**



- Research and vet creators for campaigns.

- Manage outreach, follow-ups, and deliverables.

- Track submissions, approvals, and performance results.

- Request Spark codes / whitelisting permissions as needed.



### **4. TikTok Shop Management**



- Upload and optimize product listings (keywords, visuals, descriptions).

- Track sample shipments and creator deliveries.

- Post and schedule TikTok Shop content.

- Monitor engagement and performance data.



### **5. Creative & Ad Support**



- Organize creative assets (videos, photos, briefs).

- Maintain creative performance logs (CTR, CPA, ROAS).

- Transcribe creative review calls and extract insights.

- Assist in preparing creative briefs and campaign docs.



### **6. Systems & SOP Management**



- Turn Loom videos into step-by-step SOPs.

- Maintain ClickUp or Notion dashboards for workflow tracking.

- Support automation setup using Zapier or Make.



### **7. Personal Support (Optional)**



- Coordinate travel and scheduling logistics.

- Handle personal admin or organizational tasks as needed.



---



## Requirements



- **2–3 years of experience** as an Executive Assistant, Marketing Assistant, or Project Coordinator.

- **Marketing or agency background** preferred (client or campaign management experience).

- **Strong organizational and project management skills** — able to handle multiple campaigns simultaneously.

- **Tech-savvy** and comfortable learning new tools quickly.

title: Sales & Tech Representative
description:
We’re Hiring!!!



Are you a skilled salesperson with a background in gas plumbing and/or electrical work? Do you enjoy helping customers find the right solution while using your technical knowledge? Join our growing team and work with a US online home goods retailer that values expertise, professionalism, and customer satisfaction.





Position:

Sales & Tech Representative – Technical Products (Gas & Electrical Focus)

Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

Schedule: Monday-Friday, 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST (40 hours/week)

Salary: Competitive + Performance Bonuses





About the Role:

As a Salesperson, you will assist customers with product selection, provide technical support during the sales process, and close sales with confidence. You’ll work with gas fireplaces, heaters, stoves, and other appliances, so previous hands-on experience or technical knowledge of gas or electrical systems is a MUST.





Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Help customers choose the right gas or electric heating appliance for their needs

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

Explain technical specifications and installation requirements in simple terms

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them





Requirements:

Sales Experience – 2+ years, preferably with B2C or B2B technical products

Gas Plumbing or Electrical Experience – Formal training or work experience (installer, technician, or similar roles preferred)

Excellent English – Both written and spoken

Confident Communicator – Can explain complex concepts to non-technical customers

Tech-Savvy – Comfortable using CRMs,
 platforms, order tools, etc.

Reliable and Proactive – Takes initiative and works independently

Home Office Setup – Stable internet, noise-free environment, backup power is a plus





Preferred but Not Required:

Knowledge of venting, HVAC, or hearth appliances

US product or code familiarity

Experience in the construction or home improvement industry





Why Join Us?

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping cost. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position





How to Apply:

Apply through OnlineJobs.ph with the subject line: "Sales Pro - [Your Name]"

title: Graphic Designer
description:
TYPE OF WORK: Full Time

Work Setup: Remote

HOURS PER WEEK: 40



Company Overview



Mood Solutions is a growing ecommerce business building and operating direct-to-consumer brands. We are a small team working across ecommerce and creative projects, and we are looking for a reliable Graphic Designer to support our creative and marketing needs.



This role is best suited for someone with strong design skills, excellent attention to detail, and experience creating visuals for ecommerce, social media, and advertising.



About the Role



We are looking for a Graphic Designer to help create and maintain high-quality visual content across our brands.



This role is focused on producing clean, effective, and on-brand designs for marketing and ecommerce. You will be responsible for creating ad creatives, product images, thumbnails, and other visual assets that support our campaigns and store performance.



The ideal candidate is creative, organized, dependable, and comfortable working in a fast-paced ecommerce environment. We are looking for someone who can follow design direction, maintain consistency, and take initiative when needed.



Key Responsibilities



Create high-quality graphics for ads, social media, and marketing campaigns

Expert use of AI tools to generate / modify images and support efficiency of workflow.

Design product images, infographics, and ecommerce creatives

Create thumbnails, banners, and promotional visuals

Maintain brand consistency across all designs and platforms

Edit and improve existing creatives based on performance feedback

Prepare design files for different platforms (Meta ads, websites, etc.)

Support product launches with creative assets

Collaborate with tea
mbers to execute creative ideas



Tools We Use



Canva

Gemini Nano Banana Pro

Freepik / Higgsfield

Figma (optional)

Adobe Photoshop (Optional)

Adobe Illustrator (Optional)

ClickUp



Qualifications



At least 2 to 3 years of relevant graphic design or freelancing experience

Must have a portfolio to present showcasing ecommerce, ads, or social media designs

Proficiency in design tools like Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva, or Figma

Strong understanding of layout, typography, and color

Good written and verbal English communication skills

Experience working with ecommerce or direct-to-consumer brands is a plus

 

Perks



Work remotely and choose your own hours

Engage with vibrant team communications in a supportive environment

Access to excellent tools to enhance your work efficiency and creativity

Opportunity to grow as a team lead

title: Intermediate Cloud Accountant
description:
Join the Team as a Senior Cloud Accountant at Bean Ninjas USA!

Philippine CPA license highly preferred.



Bean Ninjas USA is on the lookout for enthusiastic and skilled professionals to become part of our expanding team. If you're passionate about cloud accounting and meet the qualifications listed below, we’d love to connect with you!



Filipino candidate must possess the following (Please do not apply if you do not have the following):



~ 5+ years of full-time accounting experience within a BPO or similar environment.

- end-to-end bookkeeping experience including preparation of Balance Sheet and Income Statement

~ Proficient in cloud accounting software and platforms.

~ Strong analytical skills with attention to detail.

~ Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

~ Bachelor's degree in Accounting or related field (preferred)

- Has Xero and/or QuickBooks Online experience



Qualifications for the role:



- Full-time work (Mon-Fri) for our US clients within the Philippines working hours of 8 am to 5 pm.

- We also offer flexibility on the schedule at work once you are familiar with the processes and client work.

- Excellent attention to detail and time management skills.

- Team player who would get along well with the rest of the Bean Ninjas team



Specific Responsibilities



In this role, you will look after management reporting and weekly/monthly transaction processing for a portfolio of Bean Ninjas bookkeeping clients.



Bookkeeping Service Delivery



-Uses Xero and QuickBooks Online

-Uses Xero and QBO add-ons and integrations like Hubdoc, A2X, Receipt Bank, Stripe, and Paypal.

-Responds to client queries via our online
 helpdesk software Helpscout.

-Communicates with other staff via Slack.

-You write well: concise, understandable, helpful, professional, and fast. You can build rapport with others solely through your writing.



Remote work

-You’re self-motivated and ideally, have previous experience working remotely and with little direct supervision.

-You must have an excellent internet connection.

-You know how to keep your computer and work secure and private.

-You know the joys of using two monitors (or splitting a big monitor) to do bookkeeping work.



Who are we?

Bean Ninjas is a bookkeeping and financial reporting business founded on Australia’s Gold Coast in 2015.



We specialize in eCommerce businesses and our mission is to create financial freedom through stress-free business finances for our clients.



We have over 16 Philippine tea
mbers here and we are growing!



What’s it like being part of the Bean Ninjas team?



Career development

We believe in developing our team and promoting internally. You will go through an initial 6-month training program and will then receive ongoing training and mentoring. We prepare individual staff development plans for each tea
mber.



Flexible and remote role

This is a remote role and you will have some level of flexibility in choosing your regular work hours, but must generally be online during Philippine working hours.



Benefits

We offer a variety of benefits from 13th-month pay, birthday vouchers, birthday time off, accrued leaves, and Christmas shutdown leave (where everyone does not need to log in to work for a couple of days during the Christmas shutdown which is usually 5 to 7 working days, yet these days are still paid for by the company!), 6-week maternity leave, remote social activities, and pieces of training and up to date certifications for our accountants on various accounting platforms or integrations.



Bean Ninjas is recognized as an industry leader. You will be working alongside Chartered Accountants and CPAs who have come from firms such as Ernst and Young, BDO, and Grant Thornton.



We won the Xero Australia Bookkeeping Partner of the Year Award in 2019 and the equivalent state award for Queensland in both 2017 and 2019.



Applications can be sent to 
 and include a copy of your resume. Please do not apply if you have no relevant experience or are only looking for a project-based role. Thank you!

title: URGENT HIRING: Virtual Assistant - Administrator, IT and Accounting Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting
description:
You only get one chance: carefully follow these instructions before applying or you will not hear from us. To apply you must visit our webpage 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/



Company: Health and Life



Location: Remote (with own internet and office facilities)



Job Type: Contract (may go long term depending on performance)



About Us:

Health and Life Access is a well-established healthcare consulting Chartered Accounting firm organisation specialising in the management of service entities and organizations throughout Australia and overseas. We are committed to creating a sustainable and socially responsible healthcare system.



Job Description:

We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Virtual Assistant to provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to our organisation and clients. The successful candidate will report to the CEO and relevant supervisors, ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our business.



Key Responsibilities:

Provide administrative, IT, and accounting support to the CEO and other consultants/managers.

Maintain accurate records, perform bookkeeping, and handle client billing.

Assist with financial reporting, budgeting, and petty cash management.

Manage calendars, appointments, and correspondence.

Develop and maintain effective working relationships with staff, clients, and suppliers.

Identify and resolve problems promptly, providing potential solutions.

Participate in special projects and additional duties as required.



Requirements:

Xero Certified and have Australian Accounting experience preferred.

Proven experience in administration, IT, and accounting.

Proficiency in using Google Suite, Xero, FileMaker Pro, and other software as specified.

Strong organisational and communication skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Commitment to maintaining confidentiality and adhering to ethical standards.

Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple tasks efficiently.



Working Conditions:

Standard 38-hour week, Monday to Friday, 8:30 am to 5:00 pm ACDT.

Flexible working hours may be required.

Must have own internet and office facilities.

No leave entitlement applies

All tasks are allocated by a Google calendar. The more you complete competently and within budget, the more work you generate.



Fees:

Task-based monthly fees up to $3,000 AUD or equivalent overseas currency. Long term contract positions available based on performance.



Fees reviewed based on performance; potential for multiple fee increases for good performance.



How to Apply:

If you are a motivated and detail-oriented individual with a passion for healthcare administration.



To apply visit our ”Undergraduate up to senior accountant jobs” web page 
/job-opportunities/undergraduate-to-senior-accountant/.



Attention to detail matters, so read the application process carefully. You only get one chance.

title: HOUZEZ Theme Expert (in Wordpress & with Elementor)
description:
Houzez Theme Expert (WordPress Real Estate Websites) – Long-Term Opportunity



We are looking for a skilled Houzez Theme expert who can build clean, professional, and high-performing real estate websites using WordPress.



Our team works with real estate businesses across the U.S. and Canada, building modern websites, lead systems, and marketing funnels.



This role is ideal for someone who wants to start with project-based work and quickly grow into a long-term part-time and full-time position.



Role Overview:

- Build Houzez Theme websites from start to finish

- Customize layouts, pages, and property listings

- Set up search, filters, and user experience for real estate websites

- Configure forms, lead capture, and integrations

- Ensure mobile responsiveness and clean design

- Deliver fast, clean, and functional builds



This role is about execution, attention to detail, and delivering complete working websites.



Work Structure:

- Initial work will be task-based / per project (gig-based)

- You will be paid based on hours or fixed builds per project

- After a few successful builds, this will transition into a part-time role

- Strong performance can quickly lead to a full-time long-term position



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with the team — not just complete one-off projects.



Requirements:

- Strong experience with Houzez Theme (must have real examples)

- Ability to build full websites independently

- Strong understanding of WordPress customization

- Experience with real estate website structures (preferred)

- Attention to detail and clean design execution

- Ability to work efficiently and meet deadlines

- Good English communication

- Strong attention to detail (small mistakes in builds can affect functionality and user experience)



Bonus (not required but valuable):

- Experience with CRM integrations (e.g., GoHighLevel)

- Basic SEO knowledge

- Experience with performance optimization (speed, mobile UX)



Important:

This is not a beginner role.

We are looking for someone who is already comfortable building Houzez websites without step-by-step guidance.

You should be comfortable setting up and completing Houzez builds without relying on step-by-step instructions



Compensation:

- Paid per project or hourly (based on scope)

- Competitive rates based on experience

- Consistent work available

- Growth into part-time and full-time roles

- Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Hiring Process:

- Short interview

- Paid test task ($15 USD, fixed price) to evaluate real skills



The test task will be a small, real-world scenario relevant to the role and should take approximately 30–60 minutes to complete.



To Apply (REQUIRED):



Please include ALL of the following:



- Your experience with Houzez Theme

- 2–3 examples of Houzez websites you have built

- What parts of Houzez you are strongest at

- Write “HOUZEZ BUILDER” at the top of your application



Final Note:



We move fast.

We value people who take initiative, pay attention to detail, and take ownership of delivering clean, reliable work.

We are looking for long-term tea
mbers — consistency and reliability are extremely important to us.

We are actively hiring and looking to start quickly.

title: Cold Caller Specialist- Fluent US accent
description:
"Apply only if you have US accent"



Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM PST, Monday–Friday

Hourly Rate: $6/hr = $960/month

Payroll Setup: Bi-weekly

Industry: Commercial Real Estate Lead Generation



Job Overview:

We are seeking a confident and results-driven Cold Caller to contact property owners and generate potential seller leads for commercial real estate listings.



Responsibilities:

Make 100–200 outbound calls per day to property owners.

Follow a provided call script to introduce the company and its services.

Identify potential property sellers or listing opportunities.

Handle basic objections and maintain professional conversations.

Record call outcomes, contacts made, and collected
s in the system.

Update call status and notes in the database or CRM.





Requirements:

Excellent English communication skills.

Experience in cold calling, telemarketing, or lead generation is preferred.

Confident speaking with property owners over the phone.

Organized and able to track daily call results.

Goal-oriented with strong persistence and professionalism.





Performance Expectations

Target of 100–200 calls per day.

Aim to generate around 10 meaningful contacts daily.

Track metrics such as voi
s, conversations, and leads generated.

This role may become long-term depending on performance.

title: Fanfiction/webnovels writer
description:
what I'm looking for is someone capable and fluent in english and excels at writing stories, more specifically, writing fanfiction/webnovels about anime like Naruto, Bleach, Fairy Tail, Solo Leveling, Dragon Ball Super, Classroom of the elite, Fate/Stay night, etc... the person shouldn't just be good in writing in english, but should excel at writing stories that make readers gasp in awe, and the writer I'm looking for should also be familiar with animes in general. 



Someone experinced in writing fanfiction is what I'm looking for, someone who can write multiple stories a month, we're looking at least 4-6chapters, preferably more but I can be flexible if it's only around 4-6 chapters that can be written. Generally I have no limits, if you are able to write around only 4-6 chapters, that's acceptable, if you can write 15 or 20 chapters, that's great. Each chapter should be around
words. But even if you can do that,I will not accept anyone using A.I like chatgpt to help them with writing.



What I want is honest natural talent. so If I detect any A.I, then there's no collaboration.



If you are fluent with english, familiar with anime like the ones mentioned, are very good in writing stories, can write at least 4 chapters a month (with each chapter being around
words) and you're a natural (meaning without the help of A.I), I'd love to have you on board.



The pay is based on number of chapters written, each chapter having a worth of $25, if you write twenty chapters a month, you'll get a $500 in total. if you write six chapters a month, then it would $150, etc... 



I look forward to having you on board.

title: Sales Manager (Remote - Part Time)
description:
Sales Manager (Remote – Part Time, Inbound Sales Focus)



Stout Design Build Inc.



Position Overview



You own sales performance from first contact through signed work.



Your role is to take inbound leads generated through marketing channels 
, social media, Houzz, phone calls, and
), respond quickly, qualify the right opportunities, move deals forward, and close profitable projects.



This is a sales-driven role focused on closing and pipeline management, with light collaboration on marketing feedback and lead quality.



You are responsible for turning inbound demand into signed work while protecting company standards, capacity, and client experience.



This role starts part time with the opportunity to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



What Success Looks Like



*All inbound leads are responded to quickly and professionally

*Qualified opportunities consistently move through the pipeline

*Close rate of 25%+ on qualified opportunities

*Pipeline remains organized, active, and up to date

*Signed work aligns with target project size, quality, and profitability



Key Responsibilities

Inbound Lead Management and Qualification



*Own all inbound leads from
, social media, Houzz, phone calls, and

*Respond quickly and move each lead into the next step

*Qualify prospects based on budget, timeline, project type, and readiness

*Disqualify poor-fit leads to protect time and company resources

*Ensure no inbound lead is missed or left without follow-up



Sales Process and Closing



*Own the full sales cycle from first contact to signed agreement

*Lead discovery calls, consultations, and follow-ups

*Handle objections and guide prospects toward a decision

*Maintain deal 
ntum and prevent opportunities from going cold

*Clearly communicate scope, pricing, and next steps

*Ask for the sale and close qualified opportunities



Proposal and Deal Management



*Coordinate with the Owner on pricing, scope, and approvals

*Present proposals clearly and confidently to clients

*Capture objections, revisions, and decision factors

*Ensure full client understanding of scope and expectations



Pipeline Ownership



*Track every opportunity and its next step

*Maintain daily updates in CRM or tracking system

*Re-engage stalled opportunities

*Keep full visibility on pipeline status and deal progression



Handoff to Production



*Provide complete handoff notes and client expectations

*Ensure alignment between what is sold and what will be delivered

*Communicate key priorities, timelines, and concerns to the team



Marketing Collaboration (Light)



*Provide feedback on lead quality and conversion trends

*Identify patterns in high-converting leads and ideal clients

*Collaborate with marketing to improve messaging and targeting

*Share insights from client conversations to refine campaigns



Daily / Weekly Expectations

Daily



*Respond to new inbound leads

*Follow up with active prospects

*Advance deals to the next step

*Update pipeline and notes

*Communicate key updates to Owner



Weekly



*Review pipeline by stage and deal status

title: CX Team Lead/Manager
description:
WHO WE ARE



We don’t just build homes — we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next. 



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS



- Starting at Php 80K+ and annual raises! 

- Full healthcare coverage. 

- 100% remote. Work from the beach, the mountains, or another city. You’re free.

- Low stress, no burnout. 

- 24 days off. Not to escape life, but to live it on your terms. 



What you’ll be doing



1. Running the Team: You’ll lead a growing team (starting with just one person and scaling to 10+). You’ll manage day-to-day operations and serve as our main operations leader in the Philippines.

2. Training & SOPs: You’ll train your team, set up clear processes, and create SOPs (step-by-step playbooks) to make sure everything runs smoothly and consistently.

3. Supporting Growth: You’ll mentor tea
mbers, help them sharpen their skills, and guide them toward becoming future leaders in the company.

4. Working Together: You’ll partner with our Head of CX/Ops in the US to stay aligned with company goals and keep communication flowing across teams.

5. Driving Results: You’ll set goals, track KPIs, and coach the team to hit targets—while keeping everyone motivated and accountable.

6. HAVE FUN at our team building events in BGC with our Beverly Hills & Manila team. We're talking about haunted houses, yoga, muay thai, painting, korean bbq, rooftop happy hours, dancing, and karaoke!



What we’re looking for



1. Fluent English speaker

2. Startup Experience

3. People Leadership Experience



To apply:

description:
WHO WE ARE

We don’t just build dream homes and mansions— we create sanctuaries in nature where artists, athletes, and visionaries come to disconnect from the noise, recharge, and find inspiration to create what’s next.



WHY YOU’LL LOVE THIS

- Starting at Php 45K+ (85K when you included our numerous benefits – Free Unemployment Insurance, Bonuses, etc.)

WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

- Customer Support: Help musicians, athletes, celebrities, and top executives on chat,
, and phones with easy, low stress questions like booking rooms or general info about their stay.

- Sales & Follow-Up (Warm Leads): No cold calling! We only reach out to guests who’ve shown interest—like those who canceled a booking—to find out what happened. We also check in with past guests to share new locations and help plan their next stay.

- Back Office: We handle scheduling, calendar management, organizing files, invoicing, and other admin tasks to keep things running smoothly.

- Mega Team Retreats: We fly everyone in from our U.S. and Asia team to Bonifacio Global City for Mega Team Retreats. All expenses paid. Flights. Hotels. Vibes. Steak Dinners. Pilates. MMA. Painting. Drinks. Connection.

title: SMS Campaign Specialist (Real Estate )
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: SMS Campaign Specialist

Location: Remote (Must work EST hours)

Job Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hours/week

Start Date: Immediate (within the next 7 days)



About Us:



We’re a growing real estate investment company focused on off-market deals. Our acquisition team works directly with motivated sellers, and SMS outreach is a core channel for generating leads.



This is not a general VA role. We’re hiring ONLY experienced SMS specialists. If SMS was just 20% of your last job, this position is not for you.



Who We’re Looking For:



– You’ve managed daily SMS outreach as your main job — not just as a side task

– You’ve worked with tools like Launch Control, GoHighLevel, Smarter Contact, etc.

– You understand deliverability, compliance, opt-out logic, and spam filters

– You know how to tag leads, track replies, and move qualified prospects into CRM

– You’re not using a phone — you’ve used professional platforms and tools

– You can handle 1,500+ outbound texts/day and rotate templates properly

– You’re available full-time (45 hrs/week), working EST hours



Key Responsibilities:



– Run high-volume SMS campaigns daily using proper systems

– Monitor responses and qualify leads based on script and criteria

– Manage templates and rotate messages to avoid filtering

– Tag leads accurately and track campaign metrics

– Coordinate with acquisition and data teams to align campaigns



Required Experience:



– Minimum 1 year managing SMS outreach full-time

– Real estate investment or wholesaling background is a major plus

– Strong written English — clear, professional, and natural tone

– Familiarity with CRMs and SMS platforms

– Must be organized, reliable, and fully independent



How to Apply:



We only review serious applications from experienced SMS specialists.



Apply using the link below:







Incomplete applications or generic submissions will not be reviewed.

title: Portfolio Manager / Investment Research Analyst (Remote)
description:
JOB OVERVIEW



We’re looking for a highly analytical and detail-oriented Portfolio Manager / Investment Research Analyst to help bring structure, strategy, and clarity to our financial operations. This part-time remote role is perfect for someone who thrives on research, data-driven decision-making, and building systems that support long-term wealth growth while keeping execution efficient and organized.



Key Responsibilities:

• Conduct research on investment opportunities including stocks, bonds, real estate, tax liens, and alternative assets.

• Track and monitor portfolio performance across all accounts.

• Analyze financial data and provide insights on profitability, risk, and growth opportunities.

• Assist in developing and executing investment strategies aligned with company goals.

• Monitor market trends, economic indicators, and emerging opportunities.

• Prepare clear and concise financial and investment reports.

• Identify opportunities for debt reduction, asset growth, and portfolio optimization.

• Support budgeting and cash flow planning to ensure strategic allocation of funds.

• Work with internal tea
mbers to ensure financial systems and reporting are accurate and up to date.

• Create and maintain systems for tracking investments, returns, and financial KPIs.

• Utilize AI tools and platforms to enhance research, forecasting, and productivity.





Requirements:

• Strong background in finance, investing, or financial analysis.

• Excellent research, analytical, and critical thinking skills.

• Experience tracking and managing financial data and portfolios.

• Strong understanding of financial markets and investment vehicles.

• Highly organized with attention to detail and accuracy.

• Comfortable working independently and as part of a remote team.

• Ability to simplify complex financial information into clear insights.

• Experience or willingness to use AI-powered tools for research and analysis.



Compensation:

• $5.18/hr, capped at $400/month.

• Option for pay increases tied directly to productivity, effectiveness, and impact.





This isn’t just a research role—it’s an opportunity to directly support wealth-building strategies and help guide financial decisions at a high level. If you can turn data into direction and strategy into results, this is your role.





To Apply for the job:

Send a message to 
 or simply reply HERE with a few bullet points on why you would like this position.



Change the subject line to “I Want to Work for You In [Insert the name of the city where Jeff Bezos was born] - Portfolio Manager”



There will be a short video call interview between us and video will be required



Thank you!

s after booking are already handled by another tea
mber, so your focus will be on first interactions/ acquiring clients, organization and operations.

title: Amazon Virtual Assistant
description:
JOB OVERVIEW

We are looking for a highly skilled and reliable Amazon Virtual Assistant with solid experience in FBA, Amazon Seller Central management, product sourcing and account management. The ideal candidate will be great at communication, detail-oriented, and able to work well with minimum supervision.



Responsibilities:

Create and manage product listings in Amazon Seller Central

Conduct product research for profitable wholesale products

Contact and open accounts with brand owners, distributors, and wholesalers.

Ungating categories/brands when required

Analyse products using tools such as Keepa, SellerAmp (SAS), Helium 10, etc. to determine product viability (sales rank, competition, cost, ROI, profit margin).

Prepare and manage FBA shipments

Monitor inventory, pricing, stock levels and restock planning

Create and manage purchase orders.

Manage Seller Central tasks (listings, uploads, case logs, etc.)

Maintain spreadsheets and reporting

Communicate professionally with suppliers and internal team

Good English communication skills 

Excellent communication and organizational skills

Able to work independently and meet deadlines

Fast learner, reliable, self-motivated, and able to work with minimal supervision

- Part-time: 16 hours - 4 days per week

- Competitive salary in PHP (to be discussed during the interview, based on experience)
