title: Real Estate VA Admin (Transaction Coordinator/Listing Coordinator)
description:
Job Opportunity: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator



We’re hiring a highly organized, systems-minded Real Estate Transaction Coordinator.

This role is for someone who lives in the details, obsesses over contract deadlines, and can manage a complex transaction pipeline without a single ball being dropped. You aren't just "checking boxes"—you proactively identifies gaps in the contract-to-close process, automates repetitive tasks, and ensures our clients and partners experience a seamless, "magic 
nt" closing every single time.



IMPORTANT: Please read the entire job listing carefully. The final step of the hiring process will require the candidate to provide at least 1 former employer/team lead reference and at least 1 character reference. These will be verified prior to extending an offer.



ABOUT THE TEAM

Want to work in a rewarding, fast-paced, start-up atmosphere? Looking for significant growth and performance bonus opportunities? Have a growth mindset, value relationships, and are dedicated to getting results? Then we might be a fit!

What is it like to work with us? HEAR FROM OUR TEAM! 



Our Core Values:



DELIGHT THE CLIENT: We consistently exceed expectations by anticipating needs, delivering outstanding service, and creating those “magic 
nts” where every client feels seen and heard.



MASTER YOUR CRAFT: We commit to continuous learning, share our expertise openly, and tackle every challenge with precision and a deep sense of duty.



FOLLOW THROUGH, ALWAYS: When we say something will happen, it does—every time. We own every task, ensuring that nothing falls through the cracks, and when mistakes occur, we learn and improve immediately.

We are building an exceptional place to work with strong systems and high standards, not just managing tasks for a real estate business.



ABOUT YOU

Do you think in priorities, timelines, and dependencies? Do you enjoy turning a ratified purchase contract or listing agreements into a structured project plan with clear deadlines? Are you the type of person who catches a missing signature or a math error on a Closing Disclosure (CD) before anyone else sees it? Do you take pride in building clean systems, documenting SOPs, and keeping a team aligned without needing constant supervision? Do you love to communicate quickly and help keep the project on track?

If you are a high-level operator who wants to own the "engine room" of a high-volume real estate team, keep reading.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Transaction & Listing Management

Contract-to-Close Ownership: Manage every aspect of buyer and seller transactions from signed purchase agreement to closing using Skyslope and GoHighLevel.

Offer Packet Coordination: Prepare an offer packet draft with precise signature blocks and routing, and submit to the broker for review. 



Compliance & Auditing: Submit all required documentation to the office broker; ensure 100% file compliance at direction of the responsible broker by monitoring for no missing disclosures.

Closing Logistics: Coordinate with Attorneys, Lenders, Title officers and brokers; collect CD/ALTA statements for broker accuracy review against the commission agreement.



Project & Operations Management

System Building: Spot inefficiencies in the workflow and design/implement improvements or automations to reduce manual effort.



SOP Documentation: Document workflows and create step-by-step guides so the process is repeatable and scalable.

KPI Reporting: Maintain and update the "Deal Tracker" G-Sheet and GHL Opportunity values to ensure leadership has accurate data at all times.



The "Connective Tissue": Act as the bridge between leadership, agents, and clients to ensure no ball is ever dropped.



REQUIREMENTS

Experience & Capability

Must have extensive experience in real estate transaction coordination, transaction management, or as a high-level operations associate.

Preferred BPO Experience: Previous background in BPO Customer Service is highly preferred.

Project Management Experience: Comfortable managing 20+ active files simultaneously with varying deadlines.

Automation Mindset: Experience automating workflows (or a deep understanding of how to design them) is highly preferred.

Technical Proficiency: Working knowledge of Skyslope and GoHighLevel (GHL) is strongly preferred but not required. Fluent in AI tools (Gemini/Claude/OpenClaw) to improve output speed.

Work Style & Standards

Extremely Detail-Oriented: You find the needle in the haystack every time.

Near-Native English: Exceptional written and spoken communication skills.

Proactive Ownership: You don’t wait to be told something is broken; you anticipate it and fix it before it breaks.

Speed & Urgency: You move with a sense of purpose and meet every deadline, no excuses.

Technical Requirements

A STABLE, HIGH-SPEED INTERNET CONNECTION is required (at least 150mbps).

Must be available to respond to messages within a 12-hour daily window (standard core hours 8:00 AM – 8:00 PM EST).

Must be flexible to work 2–4 hours on weekends as needed for urgent business requirements



APPLICATION & RECRUITMENT PROCESS

STEP 1: Application

Please submit your application [HERE]. To ensure you have read through the requirements, please write the phrase "green kangaroo" in the Additional Comments field of the application.

STEP 2: Initial Interview

If your application indicates you might be a great fit, you will be invited to participate in a quick, 10- to 15-minute initial screening interview.

STEP 3: Case Interview

Candidates who pass the initial screening will be invited to a 1-hour case interview. A case interview is an interactive session where we present you with a real-world scenario or business challenge relevant to the role. Rather than just talking about your past experience, this allows us to see your problem-solving process, technical logic, and how you tackle practical situations in real-time.

STEP 4: Reference Check

This is the final step before an official offer is extended. The final candidate(s) must provide one former employer/lead reference and one character reference.

STEP 5: The 90-Day Trial Period

If an offer is made and accepted, your employment will begin with a 90-day PAID trial period. This period is dedicated to ensuring a strong mutual fit—both for the responsibilities of the role and alignment with our core values. 

During these 90 days, we will provide you with all the necessary training, onboarding, and support you need to succeed and thrive on our team. You will be expected to master the Skyslope/GHL workflow, meet all transaction deadlines, and begin documenting/improving our internal systems. A successful trial results in a permanent invitation to the team.

title: Virtual Assistant for Aesthetics Patient Communication + Social Media Support
description:
We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to support a physician-led aesthetics practice. This role is a combination of light patient communication and social media support. The call volume is low overall, but responsiveness, professionalism, and strong attention to detail are very important.



This position is ideal for someone who is proactive, visually sharp, and able to execute with minimal hand-holding. Clear direction, scripts, and content guidance will be provided, but we are looking for someone who can take ownership of tasks, think independently, and produce polished work without repeated back-and-forth revisions.



Key Responsibilities:



Aesthetics Patient Communication



Answer and return aesthetics-related calls, messages, and inquiries in a timely and professional manner

Assist with scheduling and basic appointment coordination for aesthetics patients

Communicate clearly with potential and established patients about appointment availability, next steps, and general office information

Help keep inquiries organized and ensure no patient leads are missed

Follow office communication standards and escalate questions appropriately when needed



Scheduling Support



Manage scheduling specifically for aesthetics appointments

Be aware that aesthetics patients are typically scheduled on:

Wednesday afternoons

Friday afternoons

One Saturday per month

Help coordinate these limited scheduling windows efficiently



Social Media Content Support



Edit short-form video content for social media

Follow provided scripts, overlays, branding, and content directions accurately

Plan and organize content for posting

Assist with content workflow, file organization, and scheduling

Maintain consistency in visual quality, pacing, captions, and on-screen text

Help ensure content is polished, professional, and aligned with the brand



What We’re Looking For



Strong attention to detail and a high standard for quality

Someone with an eye for clean, polished, aesthetically pleasing content

Able to work independently and problem-solve without needing constant correction

Strong video editing sense, including pacing, text placement, timing, and overall presentation

Organized, reliable, and responsive

Professional written and verbal communication

Comfortable working in a physician-led brand/business environment

Able to follow instructions precisely while also using good judgment



Ideal Candidate Traits



You notice small errors before someone else has to point them out

You care about doing things well, not just getting them done

You are not someone who needs excessive back-and-forth to reach the final product

You can take a concept, follow the direction given, and execute it at a high level

You understand that details matter, especially in both patient communication and content presentation



Workload / Volume



Low aesthetics call volume overall, typically around 3–5 calls per day at most

Some days may have no calls at all

Social media support is an ongoing part of the role and will make up a meaningful portion of the work



Preferred Skills



Experience in virtual assistant work, medical office support, aesthetics, med spa, or wellness business operations

Experience editing Instagram Reels, TikToks, or other short-form video content

Familiarity with simple content planning tools (notion social) and social media workflows

Strong English communication skills

Professional, polished, and brand-conscious



Important Note

This role is not for someone who needs constant micromanagement. Systems, scripts, and content direction will be provided, but the right person should be able to execute independently, maintain a high standard, and contribute meaningfully without creating extra work through repeated avoidable errors.

title: Remote CAD/CAM Programmer (CNC Router & Laser Specialist) - EnRoute
description:
ABOUT US:

KF Plastics is a leading plastic fabrication manufacturer based in Sydney, Australia. We specialize in high precision acrylic fabrication, engineering plastics, and signage. We are looking for a long term technical partner to manage our CNC programming remotely.



THE ROLE:

You will be our Remote CNC Department. You will log into our Sydney workstation (Remote Desktop) to prepare dxfs from customer files or drawings into "Ready-to-Cut" cnc files for our 3-Axis Flatbed Router and Laser Cutter.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:



Daily Batching: Log in daily to check the INPUT folder. Combine multiple jobs of the same material (e.g., "All 4.5mm Clear Acrylic") onto single sheets to maximize yield.



Drafting & Cleanup: Convert client PDFs/Sketches into clean DXF vectors. Verify scale against written dimensions (never trust the PDF scale).



Nesting (AlphaCam/EnRoute): Use EnRoute software to nest parts efficiently. Apply toolpaths using our specific Tool Library (Drill, Profile, Pocket).



Output Generation: Save Machine Files (.nc) and "Sheet Map" PDFs so our operators know which part belongs to which job.



REQUIREMENTS:



Software: Must be experienced with EnRoute (Nesting/Toolpathing) and SolidWorks/AutoCAD (2D Vectors).



Technical Knowledge: You must understand Flatbed Machining (Vacuum hold-down, Onion skins/Tabs, Dog-bone fillets for assembly).



Process Driven: You must follow our specific Folder Structure and Naming Conventions perfectly.



Hardware: Reliable High-Speed Internet is MANDATORY as you will be controlling a PC in Australia.



HOURLY RATE:

$8 - $12 USD / Hour (Depending on experience).

This is a Part-Time / Flexible role (approx. 10-15 hours/week) with potential to grow.



HOW TO APPLY:

Please reply with the following (Applications without these will be ignored):



A link to your SpeedTest.net result.



Your experience level with Solidworks/EnRoute (Years/Versions).



Answer this test question: If you are nesting 50 small acrylic letters (50mm high) on a flatbed router, what technique do you use to prevent them from moving or flying off the vacuum table?

 & Operations (70% of your day):

s within minutes, not hours.

experience in manufacturing, trade, or industrial sales is highly regarded

, please confirm your "Preferred English Name" that you would use on the phone with clients.

title: Operations Assistant – Website & Content Administration (Remote)
description:
We are looking for a reliable Operations Assistant to support the day-to-day systems of a growing website-based business.



This is a full-time, exclusive role, and we’re looking for someone who can fully commit to our team. Please apply only if you’re prepared to NOT take on other employers or side work while working with us.



This role focuses heavily on administration, organisation, and completing tasks carefully. The majority of the work involves managing website content, organising files, and maintaining operational processes.



This is not a creative marketing role. It is best suited to someone who enjoys structured work, checklists, and making sure details are correct.



You will work closely with our operations coordinator who manages the workflow and assigns tasks.



---



Why Work With Us?



• Be part of a leading food media company with over 1.5 million social media followers, reaching millions of people each month

• Work behind the scenes of a real content business - your work directly supports blog publishing, content systems, and traffic growth

• Learn how viral content translates into website traffic and income through platforms like Pinterest,
,
, and more

• You’ll be working closely with the team, gaining hands-on experience in managing workflows, using social media tools, and understanding how each platform contributes to the business

• This is a great entry-level opportunity for a junior candidate to learn highly valuable digital marketing skills. We provide detailed SOPs, training, and hands-on experience with WordPress, SEO,
 marketing, social media, and ClickUp project management

• Clear SOPs, checklists, and structured workflows are already in place - you’ll be guided step by step

• Your work has a direct impact - when content performs well and traffic grows, you’ll know you played a key role in making that happen

• Ideal for someone who prefers structured, organised work and wants to build real, practical skills in digital marketing





Key Responsibilities



Website Content Administration

• Upload and format articles in WordPress

• Insert and check internal and external links

• Upload images and ensure formatting is correct

• Prepare posts for publishing



Content Scheduling

title: Outreach Business Development Coordinator
description:
Outreach & Business Development Representative – Wellness Marketing Agency (Part-Time)

Company: The Coupet Collective (TCC)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Type: Part-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 10 hours/week (some overlap with U.S. business hours preferred)

Compensation: $6 USD/hour + performance bonuses for meetings that convert to discovery calls



About Us

The Coupet Collective is a boutique U.S.-based digital marketing agency that works exclusively with wellness brands — compounding pharmacies, telehealth companies, medspas, supplement brands, and mental health platforms. We're hiring a part-time outreach rep to help us reach the right decision-makers via
 and LinkedIn.



The Role

You'll be reaching out to warm, pre-qualified leads using templates and a curated leads list we provide. Your job is simple: make initial contact, generate interest, and book meetings on the CEO's calendar. We handle everything from the discovery call onward.



Day-to-day responsibilities:

Send personalized outreach
s and LinkedIn messages to warm leads

Customize provided templates to match each prospect

Qualify leads based on the criteria we provide

Follow up with non-responders (2–3 touch sequences)

Track all activity and responses in a shared tracker

Hand off interested prospects with a brief summary of their needs





Requirements:

Native-level or expert written English — non-negotiable. You're writing directly to U.S. business owners and decision-makers. Your messaging must be polished and natural.

2+ years of sales, business development, or outreach experience

Familiarity with or genuine interest in the wellness/health industry

Professional, consultative tone — not spammy

Self-motivated and organized

Reliable internet connection



Nice to have: LinkedIn Sales Navigator experience, CRM familiarity (HubSpot, GoHighLevel), prior agency or B2B outreach experience, understanding of digital marketing services.



How to Apply

Include the following:



A writing sample — write a 3–4 sentence cold outreach
 to a fictional medspa owner, pitching social media and content services

Your relevant experience summary

Your availability and confirmation of U.S. business hours overlap

Include the word "OUTREACH" at the top of your application



Applications without a writing sample will not be reviewed.

title: Wedding Venue & Vendor Data Entry (US Startup)
description:
Foreverly is a US-based wedding planning platform where couples can see real venue and vendor pricing online -- something that doesn't exist yet in the wedding industry. Think of it like Airbnb, but for planning your entire wedding. We're a small, fast-moving startup and this role has a direct impact on the growth of the company.



The Role



Your job is to build out our venue and vendor inventory. You'll find wedding venues and vendors online, research their pricing and details, and create profiles on our platform. You'll be given a simple system to follow and we'll review your work before it goes live.



This is a great fit if you're detail-oriented, enjoy research, and can work independently with minimal supervision.



What You'll Do Every Day



Search for wedding venues and vendors in specific US regions (starting with Minnesota, Wisconsin, and surrounding states)

Visit their websites and social media to find pricing, photos, menus, capacity info, and other details

Enter that information into our platform to create complete venue/vendor profiles

Flag anything you're unsure about for our team to review

Track your progress in a crm

Aim for 15+ completed profiles per day

What We're Looking For



Strong English reading comprehension (you'll be reading US wedding venue websites)

Attention to detail -- pricing and venue info needs to be accurate

Comfortable doing online research (Google, wedding directories, social media, review sites)

Self-motivated -- you'll be given targets and trusted to hit them without micromanagement

Reliable internet connection and available during agreed hours

Experience with data entry, virtual assistant work, or web research is a plus



To Apply



Please include in your application:



A brief description of your relevant experience (data entry, research, VA work)

Your available hours and timezone

A short example: Go to any US wedding venue website and send us the venue name, location, estimated guest capacity, and one pricing detail you found. This takes 5 minutes and shows us you can do the work.

title: KDP Assistant
description:
I am a high-volume Amazon KDP publisher creating coloring books, journals, and low-content products across multiple brands. I am looking for a detail-oriented, fast, and reliable Canva assistant to help assemble interiors for my books and enhance my work flow.



This role is focused on execution, speed, and consistency — not design from scratch.



You will be taking pre-made images and templates and turning them into fully formatted KDP-ready interiors- and some cover artwork.



If you are organized, efficient, and love repetitive but structured work, this is a great long-term opportunity.



???? WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING (CORE TASKS)



Uploading images into Canva templates using frames (or Bulk Creation, whatever works best for you!)

Assembling full coloring book interiors (typically 40–80 pages)

Ensuring consistent spacing, margins, and alignment

Duplicating and organizing pages efficiently

Exporting print-ready PDFs for Amazon KDP

Following structured naming and folder systems in Google Drive

Light editing to images

Upscaling for design quality



Cover creation using typography and structured layouts (secondary role)

Applying:

Title + subtitle formatting

Clean, readable font pairings

Consistent branding styles





Occasionally:

Adding simple text pages (title pages, “this book belongs to,” etc.)

Applying pre-defined formatting styles





???? MY WORKFLOW (IMPORTANT TO UNDERSTAND)

I generate all images and concepts, back of book descriptions etc.

You will NOT be creating artwork (unless asked, and proven ability to do so)

Templates are already built — you are plugging images into them

Work is organized in Google Drive folders

You will be assigned batches of books at a time



This is a production role, not a creative role.



???? EXPECTED OUTPUT / SPEED

1 book = ~40–60 pages

Target: 4–5+ books per day once trained

You will start slower while learning, then ramp up



Speed matters—but accuracy matters more



???? IDEAL CANDIDATE



You are:



Extremely organized

Comfortable with repetitive tasks

Fast in Canva (this is critical)

Detail-oriented (alignment, spacing, consistency)

Able to follow instructions exactly

Good with file management and naming systems

Reliable and communicative



???? REQUIRED SKILLS

Strong experience using Canva (non-negotiable)

Experience with:

Frames

Page duplication

Bulk editing workflows





Familiarity with:

Google Drive

File organization





Understanding of:



Basic print layout (margins, bleed, etc.) is a PLUS



???? HUGE BONUS IF YOU HAVE:

Experience with Amazon KDP

Experience assembling:

Coloring books

Journals

Low-content books

Experience with bulk creation workflows in Canva



???? HOURS & SCHEDULE

Flexible hours (work opposite U.S. time is ideal)

Consistent workload available

Long-term role for the right person





???? HOW TO APPLY (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, include:



Your Canva experience (be specific)

Examples of:

Coloring books / interiors / similar work (if available)

Your estimated time to complete a 40-page book (40 blank pages between)



Confirm you are comfortable with:

Repetitive work

Fast production expectations





Start your application with the word: “CANVA PRO”





???? WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT

Clear systems already built (no guessing)

High, consistent volume of work

Opportunity to grow into:

More responsibility

Higher pay

Expanded role (if desired)



If you’re fast, organized, and want steady work—you will do very well here.

title: AI video editor and commercial maker
description:
About Us



We run a fast-growing camping trailer and truck topper company focused on high-end, visually appealing rigs. We’re building aggressive ad campaigns and want content that actually converts—not generic, low-effort AI videos.



What We Need



We’re looking for an AI Video Editor who can create high-quality AI avatar ads and commercial-style content, but also knows how to step in and manually refine/edit when AI falls short.



This is not a beginner role. You need to know how to make content look real, clean, and high-converting.



What You’ll Be Doing

Take raw footage of trailers, campers, and product shots ? turn into high-converting ad creatives

Create AI-generated avatars for ads (sales-style, lifestyle, demo videos)

Edit videos where the owner (me) may appear ? transform appearance, voice, or style using AI tools

 / Instagram ads

Create realistic AI avatars (not cheesy-looking)

Experience creating high-converting ad creatives

Background in e-commerce or product marketing

Motion graphics / visual effects experience

What Success Looks Like

Ads look real, clean, and high-end

title: Support - Community Moderator (Graveyard Shift)
description:
Please apply to this link: 
  



About Us



Wand is building the ultimate game companion — an interaction layer that transforms the gaming experience. Our platform empowers millions of gamers to customize and enhance thousands of games through innovative tooling. What began as a passion project for technical gamers has evolved into a movement, with our best-in-class desktop application becoming essential for players worldwide.



We’re not just building software; we’re crafting the future of gaming, where every player can experience games exactly as they want to. We’re creating an entirely new category in gaming technology that will fundamentally change how people play.



Role Overview



We’re looking for a Support - Community Moderator (US ET Hours) who thrives where gamers hang out and genuinely enjoys engaging with players day to day. This role is highly hands-on: you’ll be active in conversations, keeping communities welcoming and constructive while helping us understand what players are experiencing in real time.



Beyond moderation, you’ll act as a community pulse-checker — spotting trends, recurring questions, sentiment shifts, and emerging issues across our channels. You’ll surface insights early, help players feel heard, and ensure the right teams have visibility into what’s happening on the ground.



If you enjoy engaging with gaming communities, have strong 
 moderation experience, and like connecting patterns in conversations to real product or support insights, this role is for you.



Key Responsibilities

Community Engagement

- Be an active and approachable presence across Wand’s community spaces:

- Engage with players, answer questions, and guide users to the right resources

- Encourage positive discussion and help reinforce a healthy community culture

- Maintain an on-brand voice while adapting tone and style per platform

- Collect player feedback and surface common questions or concerns internally



Primary channels: 
 (primary), Reddit, YouTube, X 
),
, Instagram, TikTok, Trustpilot, forums, Featurebase



Moderation

- Keep community spaces safe, respectful, and constructive:

- Moderate 
 and social channels in line with community guidelines

- Enforce rules consistently (warnings, removals, de-escalation, bans when needed)

- Detect and respond to spam, harassment, impersonation, misinformation, and unsafe behavior

- De-escalate tense or emotional situations calmly and fairly

- Document moderation actions, edge cases, and recurring issues for consistency



Trend Spotting & Insights

- Act as a frontline signal detector for what the community is experiencing:

- Identify recurring questions, pain points, sentiment shifts, and emerging topics

- Spot trends related to releases, outages, pricing changes, feature launches, or policy updates

- Flag issues early before they escalate or spread

- Recommend improvements to FAQs, messaging, or support documentation based on observed patterns



Escalation & Cross-Functional Communication

- Know when and how to escalate issues effectively:

- Escalate urgent concerns (bugs, account issues, security risks, harassment threats) to the Support lead

- Surface high-impact feedback and recurring requests to Product and Engineering teams

- Coordinate with Marketing or Comms during sensitive situations (misinformation, heated threads, PR risks)

- Provide clear context when escalating: what happened, where, severity, examples, and community sentiment



Required Qualifications

- 2+ years of experience in community moderation or social/community support

- Hands-on 
 moderation experience (required)

- Active PC gamer with a strong understanding of gaming culture and online community dynamics

- Strong written communication skills and sound judgment under pressure

- Experience engaging with users across social platforms and public-facing channels

- Ability to identify qualitative patterns (themes, sentiment, repeated issues) and summarize clearly

- Comfortable handling multiple platforms and switching contexts quickly

- Reliable, self-directed, and consistent in enforcing rules and guidelines



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience moderating Reddit and other social platforms beyond 

- Experience supporting a gaming platform, live service, or software product

- Familiarity with moderation tools, bots, reporting queues, or helpdesk systems

- Experience documenting guidelines, macros, or internal moderation notes

- Familiarity with feedback pipelines (e.g., Featurebase) and turning feedback into insights

- Understanding of best practices for public responses and reputation management



Core Competencies

- Community-First Mindset: Advocates for players while upholding community standards

- Pattern Recognition: Able to spot trends and recurring issues early

- Calm Under Pressure: Handles conflict and heated situations with professionalism

- Clear Communicator: Shares insights and escalations with clarity and context

- Adaptability: Comfortable working across fast-moving platforms and changing priorities



What We Offer

- Competitive compensation package

- Remote work flexibility



How to Apply

, social comments, forums, etc.)

nt, a confused user, a bug report, or a feature request

s, and any personal info.

title: Virtual Assistant
description:
Overview



The Execution Room is a high-performance trading education company helping clients execute at an elite level.



We’re looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant / Operator who can act as the right hand to the CEO — someone who doesn’t just “complete tasks” but runs operations, keeps the business sharp, and executes at speed.



This is not a basic VA role.

You will be expected to think, solve, and operate like an operator inside a high-ticket business.



Your Role



You will be responsible for keeping the backend of the business running flawlessly, ensuring smooth operations across payments, fulfilment, content, and client experience.



You are essentially the execution engine behind the brand.



Key Responsibilities

1. CEO Support / Operations

Act as the right-hand to the CEO

Manage day-to-day backend operations

Organise systems, tasks, and workflows

Ensure nothing slips through the cracks

Take ownership of problems and solve them independently

2. Payments & Financial Tracking

Track all incoming payments (Stripe, bank, etc.)

Monitor failed payments and follow up

Maintain clean financial records (Google Sheets / Airtable)

Coordinate with setters/closers on client payments

3. Client Fulfilment

Onboard new clients smoothly

Ensure clients receive access to programs, calls, and resources

Track client progress + engagement

Handle basic client support and queries

Maintain a premium client experience

4. Data Tracking & Reporting

Track KPIs across the business:

Leads generated

Calls booked

Show-up rates

Close rates

Revenue

Maintain dashboards (Google Sheets / Airtable)

Provide weekly performance reports

5. Instagram Management

Run and manage the brand Instagram page

Schedule and post content consistently

Reply to comments and DMs (where needed)

Work with the team to execute content strategy

Ensure brand image stays premium and aligned

6. General Execution

Handle any operational tasks required to grow the business

Build and improve systems

Help scale the backend as the company grows

Who We’re Looking For

Highly organised and detail-oriented

Fast executor (you get things done without being chased)

Problem solver (you don’t wait for instructions)

Strong communicator

Experience with:

Google Sheets / Airtable

Stripe or payment systems

CRM systems

Instagram / social media management

Understands or is willing to learn the high-ticket coaching space

Bonus Points

Experience in online coaching / info-product businesses

Familiar with appointment setting / sales teams

Basic understanding of trading (not required, but useful)

What You Get

Work directly with a fast-growing high-ticket brand

High level of responsibility and ownership

Opportunity to grow into an Operations Manager / COO role

Performance-based incentives

title: Interior Book Designer / Typesetter (Adobe InDesign) for 6x9 Fantasy Novel
description:
I’m looking for an experienced interior book designer / typesetter to format a long fantasy novel for print.



This is not a cover design job.

This is not an ebook-only formatting job.

This is a print interior layout job for a custom-printed book.



The manuscript is a long-form fantasy novel and will be formatted to 6x9 trim size. I also have a large number of paintings/illustrations that I want placed at the end of chapters throughout the book.



I need someone who understands how to make a book feel like a real, professionally designed object — with clean typography, elegant spacing, strong chapter presentation, and thoughtful image placement.



What I need help with:



Formatting a long fantasy manuscript for 6x9 print

Creating a clean, readable, premium-looking interior

Styling chapter openings and chapter endings

Placing paintings at the end of chapters in a visually pleasing way

Managing page flow and spacing so the book feels intentional

Preparing a print-ready PDF for my printer

Making revisions based on feedback



Requirements:



Strong experience in Adobe InDesign

Experience designing interior book layouts for print

Must understand:

margins

gutters

paragraph styles

master pages

typography

print-ready export settings

image placement for print

Must be able to work with a very long manuscript

Must have experience with books that include illustrations or images

Must be detail-oriented and able to keep formatting consistent across a large document



Nice to have:



Experience with fantasy, fiction, or premium special-edition books

Photoshop experience for preparing illustrations if needed

Experience creating interiors that feel cinematic / elegant / collectible



Deliverables:



Final Adobe InDesign package

Print-ready PDF

Fonts used

Linked image files organized properly

Any supporting exported files needed for printer submission



Important:

Please do not apply if your experience is mostly:



Canva ebooks

KDP low-content books

workbooks/journals only

social media graphics

cover design only



I need someone with real book interior experience.



To apply, please send:



A short note about your experience with print book interiors

2–3 samples of full interior book layouts you’ve designed

At least 1 example of a book interior that includes images/illustrations

Your preferred rate: fixed price or hourly

The words: DARK PULSE LAYOUT at the top of your application so I know you read this



Budget:

Open to proposals, but I am looking for someone experienced and detail-oriented, not the cheapest possible option.

Reference videos:




_

title: CPA/USA Tax Pro accountant
description:
Job Title: CPA / US Tax Accountant (Remote, Full-Time or Part-Time)



We are seeking a highly competent CPA or experienced US Tax Accountant to support a growing group of businesses with accounting, tax compliance, financial organization, and strategic financial oversight. This is not an entry-level bookkeeping role. We are looking for someone with real experience in US accounting and tax work who can operate with accuracy, professionalism, and strong attention to detail.



The right candidate will be comfortable handling financial records, reconciling accounts, preparing reports, supporting tax filings, and helping maintain clean, reliable financials across multiple entities. You should understand US accounting practices, tax requirements, and how to keep a business organized and compliant.



This role is ideal for someone who is dependable, sharp, discreet, and capable of producing high-quality work with minimal supervision.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing day-to-day accounting and financial recordkeeping

Reviewing and reconciling bank accounts, credit cards, loans, and other accounts

Maintaining clean and accurate books

Preparing monthly financial reports and summaries

Assisting with tax preparation, tax compliance, and year-end support

Supporting US federal and state tax filings

Reviewing financial data for errors, missing entries, and inconsistencies

Helping track expenses, allocations, reimbursements, and entity-specific transactions

Supporting payroll, contractor payments, and related reporting if needed

Coordinating with ownership and outside professionals on tax and financial matters

Identifying issues proactively and helping improve financial systems and controls



What We’re Looking For

We are looking for someone who is more than just a data-entry bookkeeper. You should be able to understand the bigger picture, maintain accuracy, and support the financial health of the business at a high level.



You should be:



Experienced in US accounting and tax

Strong in reconciliation, reporting, and financial review

Extremely detail-oriented and organized

Reliable, discreet, and trustworthy

Able to work independently and meet deadlines

Clear and professional in communication

Comfortable working across multiple companies or entities

Proactive in identifying problems before they become bigger issues



Required Qualifications



CPA license or strong experience in US tax and accounting

Proven experience with US-based companies

Strong understanding of US accounting principles and tax processes

Experience with bookkeeping, reconciliations, month-end close, and financial reporting

Ability to prepare for or support tax filings accurately

Strong Excel or Google Sheets skills

Experience using QuickBooks or similar accounting software

Excellent written English

Stable internet connection and reliable remote work setup



Strongly Preferred



Active CPA or EA credential

Experience with multi-entity businesses

Experience with S-Corps, LLCs, owner distributions, reimbursements, and intercompany activity

Familiarity with payroll, 1099s, and contractor reporting

Experience supporting small to mid-sized US businesses

Ability to help improve systems, processes, and reporting clarity



This Role Is Not For



General virtual assistants with light bookkeeping experience

Applicants without real US accounting or tax experience

Candidates who only know basic data entry

People who require constant supervision to stay accurate and on schedule



Why This Role Is Different

This is an opportunity to become a trusted accounting and tax support professional for a growing business group. We are looking for someone long-term who takes pride in precision, understands US financial standards, and wants to contribute at a higher level than routine bookkeeping.



To Apply

Please send the following:



Your resume

A short introduction summarizing your US accounting and tax experience

Your CPA, EA, or other accounting credentials

The accounting software and tax tools you have used

The types of US businesses you have worked with

Your expected monthly salary or hourly rate

Include the word ACCURATE in your application subject line so we know you read the full post

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT
description:
We are seeking a high-level Executive Assistant to work directly with the founder of a growing multi-company business. This is not a basic admin role. We are looking for someone who can operate with professionalism, discretion, urgency, and strong business judgment.



You will serve as a trusted right hand to the executive, helping manage priorities, communications, scheduling, coordination, follow-up, and special projects across multiple business activities. The right person is highly organized, calm under pressure, detail-oriented, and able to keep moving parts under control without needing constant direction.



This role is best suited for someone who takes pride in excellence, communicates clearly, thinks ahead, and knows how to protect an executive’s time and attention.



What You’ll Be Responsible For



Managing the executive’s calendar, schedule, and shifting priorities

Monitoring and organizing inboxes and ensuring important items are surfaced quickly

Following up on outstanding tasks, deadlines, and deliverables

Coordinating with internal tea
mbers, vendors, clients, and external contacts

Handling research, reporting, and administrative support with a high level of accuracy

Preparing summaries, documents, spreadsheets, and internal communications

Helping ensure execution across multiple projects and business functions

Maintaining organization across files, systems, and business records

Anticipating needs, solving problems, and reducing friction for the executive

Serving as a reliable gatekeeper and operator who helps keep the business leader focused on highest-value activities



What We’re Looking For

This is for someone who is more than just “helpful.” We are looking for someone who can function like a true executive partner in a remote environment.



You should be:



Exceptionally organized

Strong in written and verbal English

Professional and polished in communication

Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive information

Proactive, resourceful, and able to think ahead

Fast, responsive, and dependable

Comfortable working in a dynamic, fast-moving business environment

Able to manage multiple priorities without losing attention to detail

Capable of taking ownership and following through at a high level



Required Experience



Previous experience as an Executive Assistant supporting an owner, founder, CEO, or senior executive

Strong experience with calendar management, communications, follow-up, and executive support

Excellent command of English

Strong proficiency with Google Workspace, spreadsheets, documents, and online business tools

Proven ability to work independently and maintain high standards without micromanagement

Stable internet connection and professional remote work setup



Strongly Preferred



Experience supporting US-based executives or companies

Experience in operations, project coordination, or business support

Strong judgment in handling confidential information and executive communications

Ability to create order in fast-moving environments

Experience working across multiple business functions or entities



This Role Is Not For



Applicants looking for a casual VA position

People who need constant instruction to complete tasks

Candidates who are slow to respond, disorganized, or inconsistent

Those who struggle with follow-through, prioritization, or professionalism



Why This Role Is Different

This is an opportunity to become a key support person to a founder leading multiple business initiatives. The right candidate will be trusted, valued, and given meaningful responsibility. We are looking for a long-term person who wants to grow into a high-impact role, not someone looking for short-term freelance work.



To Apply

Please send the following:



Your resume

A short introduction explaining your Executive Assistant experience

The names or types of executives you have supported

The tools and software you are strongest with

Your expected monthly salary

A short paragraph on how you manage competing priorities and protect an executive’s time

Include the word FORESIGHT in your application subject line so we know you read the full post



Here’s an even sharper short-form premium version you could use if you want something tighter and more selective:



Executive Assistant to Founder / CEO

We are hiring a high-level Executive Assistant to support a founder leading multiple businesses. This is not a general VA role. We are looking for someone polished, highly organized, proactive, discreet, and capable of protecting executive time, driving follow-through, and helping manage priorities at a high level.



You must have experience supporting a business owner, founder, CEO, or senior executive. You should be excellent in English, highly responsive, strong with calendars and communications, and able to operate independently without constant supervision.



You will help manage scheduling, inboxes, follow-up, coordination, research, reporting, and special projects. You must be calm under pressure, detail-oriented, and capable of handling confidential matters professionally.



To apply, send your resume, a short introduction, your executive support experience, your expected salary, and include FORESIGHT in your subject line.

title: AI agent implementation specialist
description:
Job Title: AI Automation Specialist (Zapier/Make + API Integrations + Node.js)

About Us



We are a fast-growing group of businesses in distribution (food & beverage logistics) and car rentals (Turo + private fleet rentals), based in Hawaii. We are building AI-powered automation agents to streamline operations across multiple companies (order desk automation, guest messaging, cash flow forecasting, etc.).



We already have a starter kit and workflows mapped out, and we are looking for a tech-savvy implementer to set it up, connect APIs, and make everything run smoothly.



Responsibilities



Deploy and configure our AI Agents Starter Kit (Node.js + Express + Docker).



Connect APIs and webhooks for:



QuickBooks Online (invoices, AR/AP)



inFlow Inventory (stock + orders)



RentCentric (car rentals)



Turo (guest messaging, pricing)



Twilio (SMS/WhatsApp)



Google Sheets/Slack (dashboards & notifications)



Build automation flows in Zapier or Make (Integromat) where possible.



Create custom middleware/API calls where Zapier/Make doesn’t support.



Implement daily/weekly reports (cash flow, fleet utilization, delivery performance).



Ensure security best practices (API keys, webhooks, error handling).



Document workflows and provide clear SOPs for ongoing operations.



Qualifications



Strong experience with Zapier and/or Make (Integromat).



Solid Node.js/JavaScript skills (Express, REST APIs).



Familiarity with QuickBooks API, inventory systems (inFlow or similar), and car rental/booking platforms is a plus.



Experience deploying apps with Docker (basic setup).



Knowledge of Twilio SMS/WhatsApp integration.



Comfortable working with OpenAI API (ChatGPT) or other LLMs.



Strong attention to detail and documentation.



Reliable, communicative, and proactive problem-solver.



Work Setup



Remote work (Philippines-based).



20–40 hours per week (flexible, with possibility to go full-time).



Must be responsive during overlapping hours with Hawaii (HST).



Paid weekly via OnlineJobs.ph or direct method.



Compensation



$800–$1,200 USD/month (full-time) depending on experience and skillset.



Bonuses for successful milestones (e.g., working prototypes, production launch).



Long-term position possible as we continue to scale AI agents across all businesses.



How to Apply



Send your resume + portfolio (links to past Zapier/Make/Node.js automations).



Share 1–2 specific examples of API integrations you have built.



In your subject line, please write: “AI Automation Specialist – [Your Name]”.



Answer this quick question in your cover letter: “How would you connect QuickBooks Online and inFlow Inventory so an order placed by
 automatically becomes an invoice?”

title: Remote Copywriter for Short Form Content (Philippines Time Zone)
description:
We are looking for a dependable copywriter who is fluent in English, has a background in marketing, is familiar with social media content, and is seeking a remote role Monday through Saturday. You will be trained to rewrite high performing viral Instagram Reels into scripts tailored for our agency’s clients.



Availability



This role requires availability Monday through Saturday.



Ideally between 9:30 AM and 5:30 PM Philippines time, though later working hours can be arranged for candidates who prefer an evening schedule.



Requirements



- Fluent in English, mandatory requirement

- Experience in marketing or copywriting, mandatory requirement

- Very responsive and reliable on WhatsApp

- Able to learn quickly and follow systems

- Comfortable using tools such as Notion, Claude, ChatGPT, and Google Workspace

- Able to work independently using provided training and documentation



Compensation



- The position begins with a paid training period lasting approximately 2 to 4 weeks

- During training, you will be paid per short form script at a starting rate of 130 PHP per script

- As your speed and quality improve, pay may increase up to 290 PHP per script

- For trainees, a script may take up to 1 hour to complete

- Experienced copywriters typically complete a script in 15 to 30 minutes

- Over time, if we work well together, compensation may transition to a fixed monthly salary



The exact rate progression will be discussed once training is completed.



Marketing Knowledge Expectation



Applicants should be familiar with common marketing and social media concepts such as pain points, ideal client profile (ICP), target audience, hooks, calls to action (CTA), value proposition, engagement tactics, and conversion focused content.



How to Apply



To apply, please reply with the following information:



1. Your WhatsApp number

2. Confirmation that you are available during the listed time windows

3. Your background in marketing and social media

4. The smartphone model you use

5. The laptop model you use

6. A Google Drive link containing a screenshot of your internet speed test results. Make sure the link is set to “Anyone with the link.”



Thank you for your interest. We will review applications and contact shortlisted candidates.

title: ASSISTANT OPERATIONS MANAGER – CLIENT EXPERIENCE (Female only, Full-Time, Remote – Philippines)
description:
Join a mission-driven company empowering women across Asia to live stronger, healthier, and more confident lives.



We're expanding our operations team — and we're looking for a sharp, polished, and proactive Assistant Operations Manager to be the professional frontline between our clients and our Singapore leadership team.



This is a long-term, full-time position with real career growth for the right person.



YOUR ROLE

You'll work directly with our Operations Manager and Singapore-based Director, supporting the full client journey — from onboarding through to programme completion — while ensuring backend operations run accurately and on time.



Your main responsibilities:

> Manage client onboarding, scheduling, confirmations, and reminders per SOP

> Handle professional client communications via phone, Zoom, and messaging platforms

> Coordinate with Singapore-based coaches and leadership on session logistics and events

> Maintain accurate records across CRM systems, trackers, and shared drives

> Support webinar logistics — registration follow-ups, nurture calls, and attendance confirmation

> Monitor group chats, respond to client queries, and escalate where needed

> Conduct call audits and document client interaction logs

> Uphold confidentiality and professional standards at all times



WHAT YOU'LL LOVE ABOUT WORKING WITH US

- 95% Remote — work from home without the commute

- KPI-based pay — your effort is directly rewarded

- Stable, long-term career role — not a project, not a gig

- Singapore travel opportunity — top performers join us onsite for company events

- Clear SOPs and structured onboarding — you'll never be left guessing

- Leadership that's direct, fair, and invested in your growth

- Training and continuous development — we build you up as we grow

- Integrity-first culture — no politics, no drama



YOU'RE A GREAT FIT IF YOU HAVE:

> Excellent English — written and spoken, polished and professional

> Typing speed of at least 45 WPM

> A warm, confident phone and Zoom presence — clients will speak with you directly

> Strong organisational skills and attention to detail

> Experience in client-facing roles: corporate admin, BPO, hospitality, customer success, or similar

> Proficiency with Google Workspace, CRM tools, and Zoom

> Reliable internet with a backup plan

> A quiet, professional home workspace with webcam and good lighting

> A track record of follow-through, accuracy, and proactive communication



NOT A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

> Have other part-time or freelance commitments

> Are uncomfortable speaking directly with clients on calls

> Struggle with deadlines, SOPs, or working independently

> Need to be reminded to complete recurring tasks

> Respond to challenges with excuses instead of solutions

> Have frequent internet or power disruptions without a contingency plan



We need someone who takes ownership, communicates without being prompted, and holds themselves to a high standard.



WORK HOURS

Tuesday to Saturday | 1:00 PM – 10:00 PM (Singapore Time) Aligned with our Singapore operations and client base.



OUR COMPANY VALUES

Everything we do is built on five non-negotiables:

Honesty — tell the truth, always

Integrity — deliver with excellence and accuracy

Commitment — follow through, every time

Growth Mindset — keep learning, keep improving

Team Spirit — respect, collaboration, and positivity



HOW TO APPLY

Send an
 with the subject line: "AOM – Client Experience" and include clear, complete answers to ALL of the following:

1. Why should we hire you? Describe your experience — don't just list it.

2. Tell us about a time you handled a difficult client situation. What happened and what did you do?

3. Where in the Philippines are you based, and how stable is your power and internet?

4. What equipment do you use? Include computer specs and internet speed.

5. What is your backup plan if there's a power or internet outage?

6. Record a short audio introduction — share your name, something you're proud of professionally, and your favourite place to visit.

7. Attach a screenshot of your DISC profile from OnlineJobs.ph.

8. Take a typing test at 
 and include your screenshot result.



If you're looking for a stable, growth-oriented role where your work genuinely matters — and where you'll be trusted, challenged, and developed — we'd love to hear from you.



Apply now and build your career with a team that values excellence, integrity, and real results.

title: E-Commerce Customer Service Representative
description:
Your Next WFH Customer Service Job Is Waiting – Grab It!



Work with RingCould as a Customer Service Representative. Gain hands-on experience, support fast-growing online brands, work fully remotely, and build a long-term career in eCommerce.



What You Will Be Doing

• Assist customers with orders, questions, and product issues

• Turn challenges into opportunities to create a great customer experience

• Stay up to date on products, resources, and team guidelines



What We Are Looking For

• 1+ year of customer service experience

• Strong English communication (neutral or US accent preferred)

• Familiarity with eCommerce platforms like Amazon or Shopify

• Experience with tools like Zendesk, Zoho, or RingCentral a plus

• Reliable internet and quiet home workspace

• Backup device and power source



What We Offer

• Monthly pay of PHP 18,000–25,000

• Fully remote work with no commute

• Opportunities to work with top brands like Amazon, Walmart, Euhomy, and more

• Be part of a team that values growth and collaboration

• Training, mentorship, and clear paths for career advancement



Submit your application here:

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdyjt6Hf5s03g59ggWexuLXGJ-a4r6W57sNtX0B-O75VbZezg/viewform?usp=header



Who We Are

RingCould connects talent with global brands through smart home and AI solutions. Join a community where you can grow your career and thrive from home.
